articles.title: Linking battery electrode science with correlated and quantum materials
articles.title_zh: 将电池电极科学与相关材料和量子材料联系起来
articles.abstract: Author(s): Matthew A. Wright and Ram Seshadri Every time a battery is cycled between charged and discharged states, ions and electrons are shuttled between electrodes. In this process, beyond storing charge, the addition and removal of ions in electrodes provides a reversible and tunable handle over the electronic structure and magnetic order. This Research Update paper connects the chemistry of battery electrode materials with the physics of emergent phenomena, including insulator–metal transitions, geometric magnetic frustration, charge and vacancy ordering, and cooperative Jahn–Teller effects. Ion insertion is suggested as being a potentially overlooked handle for the design of functional materials, and open experimental and theoretical challenges are highlighted. [Phys. Rev. Materials 9, 110302] Published Wed Nov 26, 2025
articles.abstract_zh: 作者：Matthew A. Wright 和 Ram Seshadri 每次电池在充电和放电状态之间循环时，离子和电子都会在电极之间穿梭。在此过程中，除了存储电荷之外，电极中离子的添加​​和去除还提供了对电子结构和磁序的可逆且可调的处理。这篇研究更新论文将电池电极材料的化学与新兴现象的物理学联系起来，包括绝缘体-金属转变、几何磁挫败、电荷和空位排序以及协同杨-泰勒效应。离子插入被认为是功能材料设计中一个可能被忽视的方法，并且强调了开放的实验和理论挑战。 [物理。 Rev. Materials 9, 110302] 2025 年 11 月 26 日星期三发布

articles.abstract: Author(s): Elias Sfeir, Carolin Schrader, Florentin Fabre, Jules Courtin, Céline Vergnaud, Alain Marty, Matthieu Jamet, Frédéric Bonell, Isabelle Robert-Philip, Vincent Jacques, and Aurore Finco Confinement is an efficient approach to manipulate magnetic materials in order to stabilize complex states. In this work, the authors demonstrate its effect on a room-temperature van der Waals ferromagnet, Fe 5 GeTe 2 using scanning NV center microscopy. They locally measure the magnetization in microstructures and reveal the presence of vortices as their ground state. The stray field images also highlight the effect of the size of the patterned structures on the stabilization of the vortices, in agreement with micromagnetic simulations, thus proposing a way to control noncollinear textures in van der Waals magnets. articles.title: Synthesis of recyclable polyesters via a cis-fused ring strategy
articles.title_zh: 通过顺式稠环策略合成可回收聚酯
articles.abstract: ABSTRACT The development of chemically recyclable polymers is critical for addressing the environmental and resource limitations of the traditional linear plastic economy. Owing to its intrinsic reversibility, ring-opening polymerization (ROP) offers great potential for the development of recyclable polymers. However, achieving a balance between monomer polymerizability, polymer performance and recyclability remains a key challenge. This study explores the design and synthesis of a novel cis -fused cyclobutane-butyrolactone monomer (C4GBL) for use in ROP, leading to the formation of a polymer with 1,2-cyclobutane units in the main chain. C4GBL was synthesized using ethylene and bio-based maleic anhydride, and the resultant polymer exhibits high thermal stability ( T d , 5% = 380°C). Thermodynamic analysis of the ROP of C4GBL revealed a ceiling temperature ( T c ) of −24°C, indicating that both polymerization and chemical recycling are feasible under appropriately tuned conditions. Density functional theory optimization reveals that the rigid fused cyclobutane forces the lactone segment of C4GBL into a near-eclipsed conformation, enhancing ring strain and polymerization reactivity. Collectively, this work establishes the cis -fused ring strategy as a new design principle for recyclable polyesters.
articles.abstract_zh: 摘要 化学可回收聚合物的开发对于解决传统线性塑料经济的环境和资源限制至关重要。由于其固有的可逆性，开环聚合（ROP）为可回收聚合物的开发提供了巨大的潜力。然而，实现单体聚合性、聚合物性能和可回收性之间的平衡仍然是一个关键挑战。本研究探索了用于 ROP 的新型顺式稠合环丁烷-丁内酯单体 (C4GBL) 的设计和合成，从而形成主链上具有 1,2-环丁烷单元的聚合物。 C4GBL是使用乙烯和生物基马来酸酐合成的，所得聚合物表现出高热稳定性（T d , 5% = 380°C）。 C4GBL ROP的热力学分析显示最高温度（T c ）为-24°C，表明在适当调整的条件下聚合和化学回收都是可行的。密度泛函理论优化表明，刚性稠合环丁烷迫使 C4GBL 的内酯链段形成近乎重叠的构象，从而增强环应变和聚合反应活性。总的来说，这项工作将顺式稠环策略确立为可回收聚酯的新设计原则。

articles.title: Giant current-direction dependence of anisotropic magnetoresistance and ultralow damping in single-crystal FeNi(001) alloy films

articles.abstract: Author(s): Yuanfei Fan, Haoran Chen, Hongyue Xu, Tong Wu, Yunzhuo Wu, Yizi Feng, Yue Chen, Zhe Yuan, and Yizheng Wu This work reveals a giant, current-direction-dependent anisotropic magnetoresistance (AMR) in single-crystal bcc FeNi alloys. The authors demonstrate that the AMR ratio for current along the [100] versus [110] crystal directions reaches a record 87 at 5 K. This effect exhibits a dramatic, nearly tenfold enhancement upon cooling—unlike the temperature-stable AMR observed in CoFe alloys. They further show that this material concurrently exhibits ultralow Gilbert damping (~2.3×10 − 3 ) with negligible dependence on magnetization orientation. The unique combination of a giant, tunable magnetoresistance and low damping establishes bcc FeNi as a promising candidate for advanced magnetic memory and sensing technologies. [Phys. Rev. Materials 9, 114411] Published Fri Nov 14, 2025

articles.title: Interplay of $S=5/2$ spin-tetramer cluster magnetism and magnetodielectric effect in polar ${\mathrm{Ba}}_{6}{\mathrm{Nd}}_{2}{\mathrm{Fe}}_{4}{\mathrm{O}}_{15}$
articles.title_zh: $S=5/2$自旋四聚体团簇磁性与磁介电效应在极性${\mathrm{Ba}}_{6}{\mathrm{Nd}}_{2}{\mathrm{Fe}}_{4}{\mathrm{O}}_{15}$的相互作用
articles.abstract: Author(s): Y. K. Lin, Ajay Tiwari, C. W. Wang, J.-Y. Lin, M.-J. Hsieh, T. W. Yen, Y. C. Chuang, Y. C. Lai, Arkadeb Pal, H. D. Yang, and D. Chandrasekhar Kakarla Cluster magnetism has emerged as a fertile platform for exploring unconventional magnetic and dielectric phenomena in complex oxides. In the polar compound Ba 6 Nd 2 Fe 4 O 15 , a detailed examination of temperature- and field-dependent magnetic, thermal, and dielectric properties reveals a distinct field-induced transition from an antiferromagnetic to a ferrimagnetic phase, accompanied by pronounced magnetodielectric coupling. The study establishes a direct connection between spin tetramer interactions and lattice polarization, demonstrating how localized spin clusters mediate strong cross-correlations between electric and magnetic orders. These results deepen the understanding of cluster-based magnetodielectric phenomena and their microscopic origins in polar magnetic oxides. [Phys. Rev. Materials 9, 114407] Published Wed Nov 12, 2025
articles.abstract_zh: 作者：Y.K. Lin、Ajay Tiwari、C. W. Wang、J.-Y.林，M.-J。 Hsieh、T. W. Yen、Y. C. Chuang、Y. C. Lai、Arkadeb Pal、H. D. Yang 和 D. Chandrasekhar Kakarla 团簇磁性已成为探索复杂氧化物中非常规磁性和介电现象的丰富平台。在极性化合物Ba 6 Nd 2 Fe 4 O 15 中，对与温度和场相关的磁、热和介电特性的详细检查揭示了从反铁磁相到亚铁磁相的明显场诱导转变，并伴随着明显的磁电介质耦合。该研究建立了自旋四聚体相互作用和晶格极化之间的直接联系，展示了局部自旋簇如何介导电序和磁序之间的强互相关性。这些结果加深了对极性磁性氧化物中基于簇的磁介电现象及其微观起源的理解。 [物理。 Rev. Materials 9, 114407] 2025 年 11 月 12 日星期三发布
authors: Y. K. Lin, Ajay Tiwari, C. W. Wang, J.-Y. Lin, M.-J. Hsieh, T. W. Yen, Y. C. Chuang, Y. C. Lai, Arkadeb Pal, H. D. Yang, and D. Chandrasekhar Kakarla

articles.title_zh: Ni 薄膜中添加剂增强的基于氢和氢氧化物的磁离子控制
articles.abstract: Author(s): M. Kutuzau, M. Gößler, S. Topolovec, S. Schiemenz, D. Wolf, M. Richter, K. Nielsch, and K. Leistner Magneto-ionics, as the electrochemical modulation of magnetic properties, holds great promise for energy-efficient data storage and computing. In this work, the authors introduce metallic nickel as a material system for magneto-ionics. They demonstrate a reversible dual ionic control of magnetic moment and coercivity for nickel in alkaline electrolytes, based on electrochemical reactions with hydrogen and hydroxide species. Using thiourea as an electrolyte additive, the magneto-ionic moment changes are enhanced by a factor of 2, which is attributed to a promotion of hydrogen absorption. The use of additives might become a general strategy to enhance the performance of magneto-ionic devices. [Phys. Rev. Materials 9, 114408] Published Wed Nov 12, 2025
articles.abstract_zh: 作者：M. Kutuzau、M. Gößler、S. Topolovec、S. Schiemenz、D. Wolf、M. Richter、K. Nielsch 和 K. Leistner 磁离子学作为磁性的电化学调制，为节能数据存储和计算带来了巨大的希望。在这项工作中，作者介绍了金属镍作为磁离子学的材料系统。他们基于与氢和氢氧化物的电化学反应，展示了碱性电解质中镍的磁矩和矫顽力的可逆双离子控制。使用硫脲作为电解质添加剂，磁离子矩的变化增强了2倍，这归因于氢吸收的促进。添加剂的使用可能成为增强磁离子器件性能的通用策略。 [物理。 Rev. Materials 9, 114408] 2025 年 11 月 12 日星期三发布

articles.title: Quantum-Stabilized States in Magnetic Dipolar Quantum Gases
articles.title_zh: 磁偶极量子气体中的量子稳定态
articles.abstract: Ultracold Bose gases of highly magnetic atoms exhibit unique interaction properties that lead to striking many-body behaviors, both at and beyond the mean field. A decade ago, a universal stabilization mechanism driven by quantum fluctuations was discovered in these gases. This mechanism prevents the systems from collapsing and instead allows exotic states of matter to arise, including ultradilute quantum droplets, crystallized quantum states, and especially supersolids. After introducing key features of dipolar quantum Bose gases—including their interactions, ground states, and excitations in a mean-field framework, as well as the onset of quantum-fluctuation stabilization—we review the progress made in understanding the emergence and intriguing properties of these quantum stabilized states. Both theory and experiments are discussed.
articles.abstract_zh: 高磁性原子的超冷玻色气体表现出独特的相互作用特性，无论在平均场内还是在平均场外，都会导致惊人的多体行为。十年前，在这些气体中发现了一种由量子涨落驱动的通用稳定机制。这种机制可以防止系统崩溃，而是允许奇异的物质态出现，包括超稀量子液滴、结晶量子态，尤其是超固体。在介绍了偶极量子玻色气体的关键特征（包括它们的相互作用、基态和平均场框架中的激发，以及量子涨落稳定的开始）之后，我们回顾了在理解这些量子稳定态的出现和有趣特性方面所取得的进展。理论和实验都进行了讨论。

articles.title: Asian continental isoscapes of tree-ring δ18O: implications for paleoclimate and paleoenvironment
articles.title_zh: 亚洲大陆树木年轮 δ18O 等景观：对古气候和古环境的影响
articles.abstract: ABSTRACT Continental-scale isoscapes of tree-ring oxygen isotopes (δ 18 O TR ) are crucial for understanding atmospheric circulation dynamics, interpreting climatic significance, and tracing wood provenance. However, continental-scale δ 18 O TR isoscapes remain underdeveloped. We compiled 313 multi-year averaged δ 18 O TR records across Asia and generated isoscapes using two machine learning approaches: XGBoost and Random Forest. Results reveal a ‘sandwich’ pattern: depleted values at high (>50°N) and low (<30°N) latitudes, enriched values at mid-latitudes (30°N–50°N). This pattern closely resembles the distribution of precipitation δ 18 O (δ 18 O P ). Correlation and commonality analyses confirm δ 18 O P as the primary driver of δ 18 O TR isoscape patterns across Asia. Continental-scale δ 18 O TR –elevation relationships are generally insignificant, except in Indian Summer Monsoon regions showing significant negative correlations ( r = −0.69, p < 0.05). These findings suggest that δ 18 O-based paleoaltimetry reconstructions work best in regions with dominant moisture sources such as Indian Summer Monsoon regions. This study provides Asia’s first continental-scale δ 18 O TR isoscapes, establishing a foundation for atmospheric circulation and dendroprovenancing research.
articles.abstract_zh: 摘要 大陆尺度的树木年轮氧同位素 (δ 18 O TR ) 等位图对于了解大气环流动态、解释气候意义和追踪木材来源至关重要。然而，大陆尺度的δ 18 O TR 等景观仍然不发达。我们编译了亚洲各地 313 个多年平均 δ 18 O TR 记录，并使用两种机器学习方法生成等景图：XGBoost 和随机森林。结果揭示了“三明治”模式：高纬度 (>50°N) 和低纬度 (<30°N) 值耗尽，中纬度 (30°N–50°N) 值丰富。该模式与降水δ 18 O (δ 18 O P ) 的分布非常相似。相关性和共性分析证实 δ 18 O P 是整个亚洲 δ 18 O TR 等景观模式的主要驱动因素。大陆尺度 δ 18 O TR – 海拔关系通常不显着，但印度夏季季风地区除外，显示出显着的负相关性（r = -0.69，p < 0.05）。这些发现表明，基于 δ 18 O 的古高度测量重建在具有主要水分来源的地区（例如印度夏季季风地区）效果最佳。这项研究提供了亚洲第一个大陆尺度的δ 18 O TR等景观，为大气环流和树木起源研究奠定了基础。

articles.title: Statistical mechanics for networks of real neurons
articles.title_zh: 真实神经元网络的统计机制
articles.abstract: Author(s): Leenoy Meshulam and William Bialek Our ability to perceive, think, or act relies on coordinated activity in large networks of neurons in the brain. This review examines recent progress in connecting ideas from statistical physics, such as maximum entropy methods and the renormalization group, to quantitative experiments that record the electrical activity of thousands of neurons simultaneously. This quantitative bridge between the new data and statistical physics models uncovers new, quantitatively reproducible behaviors and makes clear that abstract theoretical principles in studies of the brain can have the level of predictive power that we expect in other areas of physics. [Rev. Mod. Phys. 97, 045002] Published Thu Nov 06, 2025
articles.abstract_zh: 作者：Leenoy Meshulam 和 William Bialek 我们感知、思考或行动的能力依赖于大脑中大型神经元网络的协调活动。这篇综述探讨了将统计物理学的思想（例如最大熵方法和重正化群）与同时记录数千个神经元电活动的定量实验联系起来的最新进展。新数据和统计物理模型之间的定量桥梁揭示了新的、定量可重复的行为，并清楚地表明大脑研究中的抽象理论原理可以具有我们在物理其他领域所期望的预测能力水平。 [牧师。模组。物理。 97, 045002] 发布于 2025 年 11 月 6 日星期四

articles.title: Molecular tools for decoding multicellular systems: from mechanisms to medicine
articles.title_zh: 解码多细胞系统的分子工具：从机制到医学
articles.abstract: ABSTRACT Cell-cell communication (CCC) is fundamental to essential biological processes including growth, differentiation, immune surveillance, and tissue homeostasis, and its dysregulation underlies various diseases such as cancer, autoimmunity, and neurodegeneration. In response to growing interest in decoding complex multicellular interactions, the 380th Shuangqing Forum entitled ‘Chemical, Biological, and Medical Frontiers in Multicellular Complex Systems’ was convened, providing a platform to discuss recent interdisciplinary breakthroughs. This review, emerging from forum discussions, highlights the latest advancements in molecular tools—such as super-resolution imaging, proximity labeling, bioorthogonal chemistry, synthetic receptors, and single-cell spatial omics—that enable unprecedented insights into spatial, molecular, and functional aspects of CCC. Emphasizing their translational potential, we discuss their profound implications for immuno-oncology, regenerative medicine, and autoimmune diseases. We further outline current challenges and opportunities, particularly advocating for a future precision medicine framework centered around targeted modulation of cell-cell interactions.
articles.abstract_zh: 摘要 细胞间通讯 (CCC) 是生长、分化、免疫监视和组织稳态等重要生物过程的基础，其失调是癌症、自身免疫和神经退行性疾病等多种疾病的基础。为了响应人们对解码复杂的多细胞相互作用日益增长的兴趣，第380届双清论坛召开，题为“多细胞复杂系统的化学、生物和医学前沿”，为讨论最近的跨学科突破提供了平台。这篇来自论坛讨论的综述强调了分子工具的最新进展，例如超分辨率成像、邻近标记、生物正交化学、合成受体和单细胞空间组学，这些工具使我们能够对 CCC 的空间、分子和功能方面产生前所未有的见解。我们强调它们的转化潜力，讨论它们对免疫肿瘤学、再生医学和自身免疫性疾病的深远影响。我们进一步概述了当前的挑战和机遇，特别是倡导以细胞与细胞相互作用的靶向调节为中心的未来精准医学框架。

articles.title: Evidence of Mott insulator with thermally induced melting behavior in kagome compound Nb3Cl8
articles.title_zh: Kagome 化合物 Nb3Cl8 中莫特绝缘体具有热致熔化行为的证据
articles.abstract: ABSTRACT The kagome lattice provides a playground to explore novel correlated quantum states due to the presence of flat bands in its electronic structure. The recently discovered layered kagome compound Nb 3 Cl 8 has been proposed as a Mott insulator coming from the half-filled flat band. Here, we have carried out a systematic transport study to uncover evidence of the Mott insulator in Nb 3 Cl 8 thin flakes. A bipolar semiconducting property with Fermi level close to the conduction band has been revealed. We have further probed the chemical potential of Nb 3 Cl 8 by tracing the charge neutrality point of monolayer graphene proximate to Nb 3 Cl 8 . The gap of Nb 3 Cl 8 flakes is ∼1.10 eV at 100 K and shows pronounced temperature dependence, decreasing substantially with increasing temperature to ∼0.63 eV at 300 K. The melting behavior of the gapped state is consistent with the theoretically proposed Mott insulator in Nb 3 Cl 8 . Our work has demonstrated Nb 3 Cl 8 as a promising platform to study strongly correlated physics at relatively high temperature.
articles.abstract_zh: 摘要 由于其电子结构中存在平带，戈薇晶格为探索新颖的相关量子态提供了一个平台。最近发现的层状 kagome 化合物 Nb 3 Cl 8 被提议作为来自半填充平带的莫特绝缘体。在这里，我们进行了系统的输运研究，以揭示 Nb 3 Cl 8 薄片中莫特绝缘体的证据。已揭示了费米能级接近导带的双极半导体特性。我们通过追踪靠近Nb 3 Cl 8 的单层石墨烯的电荷中性点，进一步探讨了Nb 3 Cl 8 的化学势。 Nb 3 Cl 8 薄片的能隙在 100 K 时为 ∼1.10 eV，并表现出明显的温度依赖性，随着温度的升高而大幅降低，在 300 K 时降至 ∼0.63 eV。带隙态的熔化行为与理论上提出的 Nb 3 Cl 8 中的莫特绝缘体一致。我们的工作证明 Nb 3 Cl 8 是研究相对高温下强相关物理的有前景的平台。

articles.title: Electromagnetic all-in-one radiation-scattering reconfigurable intelligent metasurface
articles.title_zh: 电磁一体化辐射散射可重构智能超表面
articles.abstract: ABSTRACT Reconfigurable intelligent surfaces (RISs) bring new opportunities for various fields. Currently, RISs can only be used in specific scenarios, such as wireless communication in scattering mode. It is difficult to integrate radiation and scattering modes in a single RIS for multi-scenario applications. To achieve integrated hardware design for multifunctional and multi-scenario applications while reducing hardware costs and size, we propose an electromagnetic all-in-one RIS. A simple and flexible radiation-scattering design framework is constructed, which can realize a radiation-scattering meta-atom design with on-demand polarization and phase—that is, an all-in-one radiation-scattering meta-atom. The meta-atom consists of a radiating patch and a 3-dB coupler. The radiating patch determines the polarization characteristics. The diodes are loaded on the 3-dB coupler to realize the radiation-scattering mode switching and the corresponding mode phase control. By loading different capacitors on the radiating patch, this design also integrates initial radiation and scattering phases into a single structure for the first time. The meta-atoms with specific polarization exhibit amplitude control, phase control and customizable initial phase properties. Specifically, loading PIN diodes or varactor diodes on the 3-dB coupler enables 1-bit or continuous phase regulation, respectively. Under stringent hardware constraints and limited physical space, the radiation-scattering RIS provides multifunctional capabilities within a single platform. The RIS can achieve cost-effective phased arrays in radiation mode. Non-line-of-sight communication is achieved in scattering mode. A $12\times 12$ radiation-scattering RIS was fabricated to demonstrate its performance. This framework bridges a critical gap in electromagnetic radiation-scattering systems by enabling arbitrary polarization and phase modulation, offering a promising technical solution for 6G wireless communication.
articles.abstract_zh: 摘要 可重构智能表面（RIS）为各个领域带来了新的机遇。目前，RIS只能用于特定场景，例如分散模式的无线通信。对于多场景应用来说，很难将辐射和散射模式集成在单个 RIS 中。为了实现多功能、多场景应用的集成硬件设计，同时降低硬件成本和尺寸，我们提出了一种电磁一体化RIS。构建了一种简单灵活的辐射散射设计框架，可以实现按需偏振和相位的辐射散射元原子设计，即一体式辐射散射元原子。超原子由辐射贴片和 3 dB 耦合器组成。辐射贴片决定了偏振特性。二极管加载在3dB耦合器上，实现辐射散射模式切换和相应的模式相位控制。通过在辐射贴片上加载不同的电容器，该设计还首次将初始辐射和散射相位集成到单个结构中。具有特定偏振的元原子表现出振幅控制、相位控制和可定制的初始相位特性。具体来说，在 3dB 耦合器上加载 PIN 二极管或变容二极管可分别实现 1 位或连续相位调节。在严格的硬件限制和有限的物理空间下，辐射散射 RIS 在单个平台内提供多功能功能。 RIS可以在辐射模式下实现具有成本效益的相控阵。以散射方式实现非视距通信。制造了一个价值 12 美元×12 美元的辐射散射 RIS 来展示其性能。该框架通过实现任意极化和相位调制，弥补了电磁辐射散射系统中的关键差距，为 6G 无线通信提供了一种有前景的技术解决方案。

articles.title: Sulfur-containing sustainable polymers: synthetic pathways, degradation mechanisms, and multifunctional applications
articles.title_zh: 含硫可持续聚合物：合成途径、降解机制和多功能应用
articles.abstract: ABSTRACT Degradable sulfur-containing polymers leverage the controllable cleavage of thioester and thioether bonds under external stimuli, coupled with closed-loop recyclability, to significantly mitigate plastic pollution. The dynamic covalent adaptability of sulfur bonds within the polymer backbone, combined with the high refractive index arising from sulfur’s high polarizability, enables the integration of stimuli-responsive degradation and multifunctionality. Advanced polymerization techniques, such as ring-opening polymerization and reversible addition-fragmentation chain-transfer polymerization, permit precise control over the architecture of the backbone, yielding high-performance materials with tunable thermal, mechanical, and optical properties. These materials demonstrate significant potential in biomedicine, environmental remediation, and energy storage. Focusing on molecular design, degradation control, and functional diversification, this review systematically elucidates synthetic strategies, degradation mechanisms, and frontier applications, while providing perspectives on future developments.
articles.abstract_zh: 摘要 可降解含硫聚合物利用硫酯和硫醚键在外部刺激下的可控裂解，加上闭环可回收性，可显着减轻塑料污染。聚合物主链内硫键的动态共价适应性，加上硫的高极化性所产生的高折射率，使得刺激响应性降解和多功能性相结合。先进的聚合技术，例如开环聚合和可逆加成断裂链转移聚合，可以精确控制主链的结构，从而产生具有可调热、机械和光学性能的高性能材料。这些材料在生物医学、环境修复和能源储存方面表现出巨大的潜力。该综述重点关注分子设计、降解控制和功能多样化，系统阐明了合成策略、降解机制和前沿应用，同时提供了未来发展的展望。

articles.title: The utilization of ions in seawater for electrocatalysis
articles.title_zh: 利用海水中的离子进行电催化
articles.abstract: ABSTRACT Electrocatalysis in water offers a sustainable pathway for synthesizing hydrogen and hydrocarbons, leveraging water as a source of protons and hydroxides. However, the inherent presence of ions in water significantly influences the adsorption of active species, often disrupting electrocatalytic performance. While strategies have advanced to repel interfering ions and mitigate their adverse effects in seawater electrocatalysis, recent findings reveal that certain seawater ions can enhance electrocatalytic processes. This enhancement occurs either by promoting the adsorption of crucial reaction intermediates or by directly participating as reactants. Despite this potential, the underlying mechanisms and practical applications of these ion-involved reactions remain poorly understood and lack systematic evaluation. This review provides a timely appraisal of electrochemical reactions that strategically utilize seawater ions. It highlights recent advancements in methodologies and strategies within this emerging field. Firstly, we delve into the designs and mechanisms enabling chloride utilization in various electrocatalytic reactions. Next, we discuss intelligent protocols for sodium utilization, including asymmetric designs, aqueous alternating and cascade seawater electrocatalysis. Subsequently, we elucidate the critical role of local pH limitations and the impact of external forces on catalysts for direct seawater electrocatalysis. Finally, the electrochemical extraction of valuable resources such as uranium and lithium is summarized, with a focus on innovative electrode modifications and optimized cell configurations.
articles.abstract_zh: 摘要 水中的电催化利用水作为质子和氢氧化物的来源，为合成氢气和碳氢化合物提供了一种可持续的途径。然而，水中固有的离子的存在会显着影响活性物质的吸附，通常会破坏电催化性能。虽然在海水电催化中排斥干扰离子并减轻其不利影响的策略已经取得进展，但最近的研究结果表明某些海水离子可以增强电催化过程。这种增强是通过促进关键反应中间体的吸附或直接作为反应物参与来实现的。尽管具有这种潜力，但这些涉及离子的反应的基本机制和实际应用仍然知之甚少，并且缺乏系统评估。该综述对战略性利用海水离子的电化学反应提供了及时的评估。它强调了这个新兴领域的方法和策略的最新进展。首先，我们深入研究了在各种电催化反应中利用氯化物的设计和机制。接下来，我们讨论钠利用的智能方案，包括不对称设计、水相交替和级联海水电催化。随后，我们阐明了局部 pH 限制的关键作用以及外力对直接海水电催化催化剂的影响。最后，总结了铀和锂等有价值资源的电化学提取，重点是创新的电极修改和优化的电池配置。

articles.title: Covalent organic framework-based heterojunction photocatalysts
articles.title_zh: 基于共价有机骨架的异质结光催化剂
articles.abstract: ABSTRACT Photocatalysis, as a sustainable, green and low-cost technology that converts solar energy into chemical energy, holds great potential to address the issues of environmental pollution and energy shortages. However, the rapid charge recombination in semiconductors limits their potential for achieving high photocatalytic activity. Heterojunctions, including inorganic-inorganic, organic-inorganic, and organic-organic heterojunctions, have proven to be an effective strategy for inhibiting charge recombination. By virtue of the high crystallinity, tunable structure and accessible pore systems of covalent organic frameworks (COFs), COF-based heterojunction photocatalysts have shown appealing prospects for promoting solar-to-energy conversion by improving charge separation, enhancing light-harvesting ability and facilitating photoredox reactions. In this review, the state-of-the-art progress in COF-based heterojunction photocatalysts including their mechanism, classification, synthetic strategies and applications are summarized. In particular, the synergistic effect and charge transfer mechanism as well as the structure–activity relationships of COF-based heterojunctions are thoroughly reviewed. Finally, the challenges and outlooks of COF-based heterojunction photocatalysts are also discussed. It is believed that this review can stimulate inspiration for the future development of efficient COF-based heterojunction photocatalysts.
articles.abstract_zh: 摘要 光催化作为一种​​可持续、绿色、低成本的将太阳能转化为化学能的技术，在解决环境污染和能源短缺问题方面具有巨大潜力。然而，半导体中的快速电荷复合限制了它们实现高光催化活性的潜力。异质结，包括无机-无机、有机-无机和有机-有机异质结，已被证明是抑制电荷复合的有效策略。凭借共价有机框架（COF）的高结晶度、可调节结构和易接近的孔隙系统，基于COF的异质结光催化剂在通过改善电荷分离、增强光捕获能力和促进光氧化还原反应来促进太阳能到能源转换方面显示出诱人的前景。本文综述了COF基异质结光催化剂的最新进展，包括其机理、分类、合成策略和应用。特别是，对COF基异质结的协同效应和电荷转移机制以及构效关系进行了深入的综述。最后，还讨论了基于COF的异质结光催化剂的挑战和前景。相信这篇综述可以为未来开发高效的基于COF的异质结光催化剂激发灵感。

articles.title: Dramatic biases in terrestrial nitrogen fixation in Earth System Models revealed by natural isotope signatures
articles.title_zh: 自然同位素特征揭示地球系统模型中陆地固氮的巨大偏差
articles.abstract: ABSTRACT Biological nitrogen fixation (BNF) is the primary input of new reactive nitrogen to natural terrestrial ecosystems. However, this flux is poorly constrained due to its unclear drivers and associated control mechanisms. Here, we extend the existing theory of nitrogen (N) isotope mass balance to estimate BNF rates and then use a Bayesian approach to constrain the BNF rates in natural terrestrial ecosystems by using measurements of natural N-isotope ratios (δ 15 N) in plants (δ P ) and soil (δ S ). Together with pairwise δ P and δ S measurements from 18 forest sites covering diverse climates and thousands of δ P and δ S observations worldwide, we show that the spatial distribution of the fraction of symbiotic BNF relative to the total external N acquisition by plants ( f BNFs ) is primarily controlled by temperature (29%) and mycorrhizal fungi (14%), with colder climate and higher ectomycorrhizal fungi abundance leading to a lower f BNFs . We find a large discrepancy between the spatial distributions of isotope-based BNF and those simulated by using Earth System Models (ESMs) in the Sixth Phase of the Coupled Model Intercomparison Project (CMIP6). Moreover, we constrain the global total BNF from natural terrestrial ecosystems as 78.2–89.8 Tg N yr −1 , suggesting a ≥18% underestimation of the global BNF in CMIP6 models. In addition to the temperature dependence found in previous laboratory studies, our isotope-based study suggests a competitive relationship between BNF and mycorrhizal N uptake as another important control mechanism. This complex interplay remains unresolved in ESMs and has the potential to improve BNF simulations in the next phase of CMIP.
articles.abstract_zh: 摘要 生物固氮（BNF）是新的活性氮进入自然陆地生态系统的主要输入。然而，由于其驱动因素和相关控制机制不明确，这种通量受到的约束很差。在这里，我们扩展了现有的氮 (N) 同位素质量平衡理论来估计 BNF 率，然后通过测量植物 (δ P ) 和土壤 (δ S ) 中的天然 N 同位素比率 (δ 15 N)，使用贝叶斯方法来约束自然陆地生态系统中的 BNF 率。结合来自覆盖不同气候的 18 个森林点的成对 δ P 和 δ S 测量以及全球数千个 δ P 和 δ S 观测结果，我们表明，共生 BNF 相对于植物外部氮吸收总量 (f BNFs ) 的空间分布主要受温度 (29%) 和菌根真菌 (14%) 控制，气候较冷和外生菌根真菌丰度较高，导致 f BNF 较低。我们发现基于同位素的BNF的空间分布与耦合模型比对项目（CMIP6）第六阶段中使用地球系统模型（ESM）模拟的空间分布之间存在很大差异。此外，我们将自然陆地生态系统的全球总 BNF 限制为 78.2–89.8 Tg N yr -1 ，这表明 CMIP6 模型中全球 BNF 被低估了 ≥18%。除了之前实验室研究中发现的温度依赖性外，我们基于同位素的研究表明 BNF 和菌根氮吸收之间的竞争关系是另一个重要的控制机制。这种复杂的相互作用在 ESM 中仍未得到解决，并且有可能在 CMIP 的下一阶段中改进 BNF 模拟。

articles.title: Potential of the World Network of Biosphere Reserves to advance the Kunming-Montreal Global Biodiversity Framework
articles.title_zh: 世界生物圈保护区网络推进昆明-蒙特利尔全球生物多样性框架的潜力
articles.abstract: ABSTRACT As one of UNESCO’s three key site-based designations, the World Network of Biosphere Reserves (BRs) integrates conservation and development, setting it apart from traditional protected areas (PAs). Yet its conservation effectiveness and role in advancing the global biodiversity agenda remain underexplored. This evidence-based global assessment of BRs’ effectiveness and potential in supporting the Kunming-Montreal Global Biodiversity Framework (KMGBF) indicates that generally BRs maintained habitat quality not lower than that of PAs, with region-specific instances where BRs surpassed sites in IUCN Categories IV-VI. Including BRs—typically omitted from global conservation statistics—into conservation efforts increased terrestrial coverage for KMGBF Target 3 from 16.57% to 19.65%. With effective implementation, integration of BRs into the global area-based conservation network would produce measurable coverage gains across six KMGBF-linked opportunity templates, including +8.47% for Biodiversity Hotspots (per Target 1), +4.05% for Risk Ecoregions (per Target 2), +7.01% for Phylogenetic Diversity Hotspots (per Target 4), +7.25% for areas of high Traded Functional Diversity (per Target 5), +4.37% for regions of High Biomass Carbon (per Target 8), and +1.95% for globally Indigenous Lands (per Target 22). Based on integrated assessments of conservation value and coverage rate, 17 Udvardy’s Biogeographical Provinces were identified as post-2025 WNBR expansion priorities that align with the KMGBF and the Hangzhou Strategic Action Plan (2026–2035).
articles.abstract_zh: 摘要 作为联合国教科文组织三个关键地点指定之一，世界生物圈保护区网络（BR）将保护与开发融为一体，使其有别于传统的保护区（PA）。然而，其保护有效性和在推进全球生物多样性议程中的作用仍未得到充分探讨。这项对生物圈保护区在支持昆明-蒙特利尔全球生物多样性框架 (KMBBF) 方面的有效性和潜力的基于证据的全球评估表明，生物圈保护区的栖息地质量总体上不低于保护区，在特定区域的情况下，生物圈保护区的栖息地质量超过了 IUCN IV-VI 类中的地点。将生物圈保护区（通常在全球保护统计数据中省略）纳入保护工作中，将 KMBF 目标 3 的陆地覆盖率从 16.57% 提高到 19.65%。通过有效实施，将生物圈保护区纳入全球区域保护网络将为六个与 KMBF 相关的机会模板带来可衡量的覆盖范围增益，包括生物多样性热点 +8.47%（根据目标 1）、风险生态区 +4.05%（根据目标 2）、系统发育多样性热点 +7.01%（根据目标 4）、高贸易功能多样性区域 +7.25% （根据目标 5），高生物质碳地区增加 4.37%（根据目标 8），全球原住民土地增加 1.95%（根据目标 22）。基于对保护价值和覆盖率的综合评估，乌德瓦尔迪的 17 个生物地理省被确定为 2025 年后 WNBR 扩展优先事项，与 KMBBF 和杭州战略行动计划（2026-2035 年）保持一致。

articles.title: Swarm coordination of fish-like magnetic soft robots: directed aggregation and shape-adaptive attachment toward efficient drug delivery
articles.title_zh: 类鱼磁性软机器人的群体协调：定向聚集和形状自适应附件以实现高效药物输送
articles.abstract: ABSTRACT Miniature magnetic untethered soft robots offer promising opportunities for biomedical applications due to their tissue compatibility, functionalizable dimensions and flexible locomotion capabilities. However, their small size creates a mismatch between coverage area and lesion regions, limiting drug delivery efficacy. Here, inspired by natural fish migration and foraging behaviors, we present an approach to overcome these limitations through swarm coordination of fish-like magnetic soft robots. Individual robots with simplified designs for scalable production can perform constrained six-degrees-of-freedom fish-like maneuvers under an oscillating magnetic field and gradient magnetic field. By exploiting the unique property of the constant component of the oscillating magnetic field dominating the swimming direction when the actuation frequency approaches the robot’s natural frequency, we achieved differentiated control of individual swimming directions under global magnetic field actuation through programming spatial distribution patterns of the constant field component. This enables our robotic swarm to demonstrate active spatial aggregation toward specific lesion areas and shape-adaptive attachment capabilities upon reaching the target. This work provides a new pathway for efficient therapeutic payload delivery to lesions through coordinated miniature magnetic soft robot swarms.
articles.abstract_zh: 摘要：微型磁性无绳软机器人由于其组织兼容性、功能化尺寸和灵活的运动能力，为生物医学应用提供了有前景的机会。然而，它们的小尺寸造成覆盖区域和病变区域之间的不匹配，限制了药物输送功效。在这里，受鱼类自然迁徙和觅食行为的启发，我们提出了一种通过类鱼磁性软机器人的群体协调来克服这些限制的方法。具有可扩展生产的简化设计的单个机器人可以在振荡磁场和梯度磁场下执行受限的六自由度鱼状动作。利用当驱动频率接近机器人固有频率时振荡磁场的恒定分量主导游泳方向的独特性质，我们通过对恒定场分量的空间分布模式进行编程，实现了全局磁场驱动下个体游泳方向的差异化控制。这使得我们的机器人群能够展示针对特定病变区域的主动空间聚合以及到达目标后的形状自适应附着能力。这项工作为通过协调的微型磁性软机器人群有效地将治疗有效载荷输送到病变部位提供了一条新途径。

articles.title: When brain implants go mobile: rethinking neural probe design for dynamics and intelligence
articles.title_zh: 当大脑植入物变得可移动时：重新思考神经探针设计的动力学和智能

articles.title: Vacuum-assisted vertical component distribution in pseudo-bulk heterojunctions: a pathway to high-performance and stable organic solar cells
articles.title_zh: 赝体异质结中的真空辅助垂直成分分布：高性能和稳定有机太阳能电池的途径
articles.abstract: ABSTRACT Precise control over the vertical component distribution and molecular packing within the photoactive layer is paramount for achieving high-performance organic solar cells (OSCs). However, optimizing these parameters in sequentially deposited pseudo-bulk heterojunction (p-BHJ) architecture remains challenging, often limited by inefficient self-assembly of organic semiconductors. In this work, a post-treatment combining vacuum and thermal annealing (VTA) is adopted. A range of morphological measurements demonstrate that compared with the traditional thermal annealing (TA) treatment, VTA can accelerate solvent evaporation, promoting the crystallization of acceptor at the top surface and inhibiting excessive intermixing between donor and acceptor, and therefore leads to a more stratified p-i-n configuration with interpenetrated donor–acceptor networks. This morphology modulation enhances carrier mobility and suppresses charge recombination, culminating in a champion power conversion efficiency (PCE) of 20.5% for binary OSCs. Furthermore, due to the enhanced crystallinity and more compact molecular packing, the optimized film also exhibits exceptional photo and morphological stability, achieving a T 80 of over 3900 hours in a conventional ITO/PEDOT:PSS/PM6/L8-BO/PDINN/Ag structure, and 54 000 h in an interfacial-stable ITO/MoO 3 /PM6/L8-BO/C 60 /BCP/Ag structure, under the continuous one-sun illumination with a criterion of ISOS-L-1.
articles.abstract_zh: 摘要 精确控制光敏层内的垂直成分分布和分子堆积对于实现高性能有机太阳能电池（OSC）至关重要。然而，在顺序沉积的伪本体异质结（p-BHJ）架构中优化这些参数仍然具有挑战性，通常受到有机半导体低效自组装的限制。在这项工作中，采用了真空和热退火（VTA）相结合的后处理。一系列形态测量表明，与传统的热退火（TA）处理相比，VTA可以加速溶剂蒸发，促进顶面受体的结晶，抑制供体和受体之间的过度混合，从而形成具有互穿供体-受体网络的更加分层的p-i-n构型。这种形态调制增强了载流子迁移率并抑制电荷复合，最终使二元 OSC 的功率转换效率 (PCE) 达到 20.5%。此外，由于结晶度增强和分子堆积更紧凑，优化后的薄膜还表现出优异的光稳定性和形态稳定性，在传统的ITO/PEDOT:PSS/PM6/L8-BO/PDINN/Ag结构中实现了超过3900小时的T 80 ，在界面稳定的ITO/MoO 3 /PM6/L8-BO/C 60 /BCP/Ag结构中实现了54 000小时的T 80 。连续一太阳照明，标准为 ISOS-L-1。

articles.title: Prospects for supersymmetry at High-Luminosity LHC
articles.title_zh: 高光度大型强子对撞机超对称性的前景
articles.abstract: Author(s): Howard Baer, Vernon Barger, Jessica Bolich, Juhi Dutta, Dakotah Martinez, Shadman Salam, Dibyashree Sengupta, and Kairui Zhang Supersymmetry remains one of the leading candidates for physics beyond the standard model, offering a compelling framework to address the hierarchy of scales. Its theoretical appeal has inspired decades of intensive model building and experimental searches. Recent results have placed stringent bounds on the supersymmetric parameter space, sharpening the focus on the remaining viable models. This review surveys the current status and outlook for supersymmetry in light of experimental constraints and recent theoretical developments, and presents projections for the discovery potential of the High-Luminosity Large Hadron Collider across multiple search channels and a variety of well-motivated scenarios. [Rev. Mod. Phys. 97, 045001] Published Fri Oct 17, 2025
articles.abstract_zh: 作者：Howard Baer、Vernon Barger、Jessica Bolich、Juhi Dutta、Dakotah Martinez、Shadman Salam、Dibyashree Sengupta 和 Kairui Zhang 超对称仍然是超越标准模型的物理学的主要候选者之一，为解决尺度层次结构提供了一个令人信服的框架。它的理论吸引力激发了数十年的深入模型构建和实验研究。最近的结果对超对称参数空间施加了严格的限制，从而使人们更加关注剩余的可行模型。这篇综述根据实验限制和最新理论发展调查了超对称性的现状和前景，并对高光度大型强子对撞机在多个搜索渠道和各种动机良好的场景中的发现潜力进行了预测。 [牧师。模组。物理。 97, 045001] 2025 年 10 月 17 日星期五发布
authors: Howard Baer, Vernon Barger, Jessica Bolich, Juhi Dutta, Dakotah Martinez, Shadman Salam, Dibyashree Sengupta, and Kairui Zhang
articles.journal: Recent Articles in Rev. Mod. Phys.

articles.title: One-pot organocatalysis of diacrylates to functional polyesters for toughening polylactide
articles.title_zh: 二丙烯酸酯一锅有机催化制备功能性聚酯以增韧聚丙交酯
articles.abstract: ABSTRACT Conventional chain-growth polymerization of acrylic monomers or diacrylics leads to non-degradable vinyl polymers or crosslinked networks, while existing step-growth polymerization affords saturated or main-chain unsaturated polyesters, hindering post-functionalization. Here, we introduce a hydrogen-transfer polymerization (HTP) strategy via the trialkylphosphine-catalyzed head-to-tail C–C coupling between the α - and β -positions of two vinyl groups of diacrylates with exclusive regioselectivity, producing unsaturated polyesters with side-chain double bonds that can undergo the subsequent thiol-Michael click reaction in a one-pot fashion with the carryover phosphine from the HTP step. The resulting hydroxyl-functionalized polyesters serve as macroinitiators for the efficient synthesis of densely grafted poly( l -lactide) (PLLA) bottlebrush polymers. Such bottlebrush polymers markedly toughen the otherwise brittle PLLA (by ∼10×), while not only uniquely preserving high melting temperature and crystallinity of PLLA but also synergistically increasing the PLLA crystallization rate.
articles.abstract_zh: 摘要：丙烯酸单体或二丙烯酸的传统链增长聚合会产生不可降解的乙烯基聚合物或交联网络，而现有的逐步增长聚合会产生饱和或主链不饱和聚酯，阻碍后官能化。在这里，我们引入了一种氢转移聚合（HTP）策略，通过三烷基膦催化的二丙烯酸酯的两个乙烯基的α-和β-位之间的头尾C-C偶联，具有独特的区域选择性，产生具有侧链双键的不饱和聚酯，该聚酯可以以一锅的方式与HTP步骤中残留的膦进行后续的硫醇-迈克尔点击反应。所得羟基官能化聚酯可作为大分子引发剂，用于有效合成密集接枝聚(L-丙交酯)(PLLA)瓶刷聚合物。这种瓶刷聚合物显着增韧了原本易碎的 PLLA（约 10 倍），同时不仅独特地保持了 PLLA 的高熔融温度和结晶度，而且还协同提高了 PLLA 结晶速率。

articles.title: Discovering MXenes, the building blocks for future technology: an interview with Yury Gogotsi
articles.title_zh: 探索 MXenes，未来技术的构建模块：尤里·戈戈西 (Yury Gogotsi) 访谈
articles.abstract: Abstract MXenes, a large and still expanding family of 2D transition metal carbides and nitrides, provide abundant building blocks with unique properties for advancing low-dimensional materials and devices. Since their discovery in 2011, hundreds of MXene compositions have been synthesized and shown tunable electronic, optical, mechanical and electrochemical properties, leading to applications ranging from optics, optoelectronics and wireless communication to energy storage, sensing and biomedicine. In particular, the unusual interactions of MXenes with electromagnetic waves over ultraviolet, visible, infrared, terahertz and microwave ranges offer tremendous opportunities in emerging information technology and electromagnetic protection. Nowadays, after more than a decade of development, MXenes have also reached the critical stage of industrial transformation in addition to further fundamental exploration . NSR spoke to the leading inventor of MXenes—Distinguished University Professor Yury Gogotsi, the Charles T. and Ruth M. Bach Endowed Chair in the Department of Materials Science and Engineering at Drexel University, Director of the A. J. Drexel Nanomaterials Institute, a Fellow of the National Academy of Inventors, the World Academy of Ceramics, the European Academy of Sciences, Academia Europaea and many professional societies, the Citations Laureate in Physics by Clarivate, and recipient of numerous awards .
articles.abstract_zh: 摘要 MXene 是一个仍在不断扩展的二维过渡金属碳化物和氮化物家族，为推进低维材料和器件提供了丰富的具有独特性能的构建模块。自 2011 年发现以来，数百种 MXene 组合物已被合成，并显示出可调节的电子、光学、机械和电化学特性，导致其应用范围从光学、光电子和无线通信到能源存储、传感和生物医学。特别是，MXenes 与紫外线、可见光、红外线、太赫兹和微波范围内的电磁波不寻常的​​相互作用为新兴信息技术和电磁防护提供了巨大的机会。如今，MXenes经过十多年的发展，除了进一步的基础性探索外，也已经到了产业转型的关键阶段。 NSR 采访了 MXenes 的主要发明人 — 杰出大学教授 Yury Gogotsi、德雷塞尔大学材料科学与工程系 Charles T. 和 Ruth M. Bach 讲座教授、A. J. Drexel 纳米材料研究所所长、美国国家发明家科学院院士、世界陶瓷科学院院士、欧洲科学院院士、欧洲科学院和许多专业学会院士、物理学引文奖获得者科睿唯安，荣获众多奖项。

articles.title: Two-Dimensional Bulk Ferroics
articles.title_zh: 二维块状铁磁性材料
articles.abstract: The discovery of ferroic orders in two-dimensional (2D) van der Waals (vdW) materials has introduced new functionalities to the 2D materials family, potentially revolutionizing next-generation nanoelectronics and spintronics. We provide a concise review of recent advances in 2D ferroics, with a focus on their experimental observations, the unique properties emerging from reduced dimensionality, and promising applications. We conclude by discussing key challenges that remain and offering our outlook on future research directions in this rapidly evolving field.
articles.abstract_zh: 二维 (2D) 范德华 (vdW) 材料中铁序的发现为 2D 材料系列引入了新功能，有可能彻底改变下一代纳米电子学和自旋电子学。我们对二维铁磁性材料的最新进展进行了简要回顾，重点关注其实验观察、降维产生的独特性质以及有前景的应用。最后，我们讨论了仍然存在的主要挑战，并对这个快速发展的领域的未来研究方向提出了展望。

articles.title: AI-enhanced flexible ECG patch for accurate heart disease diagnosis, optimal wear positioning, and interactive medical consultation
articles.title_zh: 人工智能增强型柔性心电图贴片，可实现准确的心脏病诊断、最佳佩戴定位和交互式医疗咨询
articles.abstract: ABSTRACT Continuous and reliable electrocardiogram (ECG) monitoring is crucial for the early diagnosis and intervention of heart diseases, which remain a leading threat to global health and mortality. Traditional ECG devices are often bulky, complex, and require hospital visits, limiting their practicality for daily use. To overcome these challenges, we have developed a wireless, flexible, and user-friendly ECG monitoring system integrated with advanced artificial intelligence (AI) capabilities. Our innovative ECG patch features an island-and-bridge serpentine structure, offering strain insensitivity of up to 100%, robust adhesion (7.6 kPa), and a high signal-to-noise ratio (28 dB). The accompanying mobile application leverages the interpretable attention transformer (IAT) model for heart disease diagnosis with up to 98% accuracy, a generative adversarial network (GAN) combined with convolutional neural networks (CNNs) and gated recurrent units (GRUs) for wear positioning correction with 85% accuracy, and GPT-based consultations with sub-second response times. This system enables real-time diagnosis, accurate wear positioning, and personalized medical advice, effectively bridging the gap between hospital care and at-home monitoring. Our work enhances accessibility to cardiac care, promotes early detection, and reduces the burden on healthcare systems.
articles.abstract_zh: 摘要 持续可靠的心电图 (ECG) 监测对于心脏病的早期诊断和干预至关重要，心脏病仍然是全球健康和死亡率的主要威胁。传统的心电图设备通常体积庞大、复杂，并且需要去医院就诊，限制了其日常使用的实用性。为了克服这些挑战，我们开发了一种集成了先进人工智能 (AI) 功能的无线、灵活且用户友好的心电图监测系统。我们的创新心电图贴片采用岛桥蛇形结构，具有高达 100% 的应变不敏感性、牢固的附着力 (7.6 kPa) 和高信噪比 (28 dB)。随附的移动应用程序利用可解释注意力变换器 (IAT) 模型进行心脏病诊断，准确率高达 98%，利用生成对抗网络 (GAN) 与卷积神经网络 (CNN) 和门控循环单元 (GRU) 相结合，进行磨损定位校正，准确率达 85%，以及基于 GPT 的亚秒级响应时间咨询。该系统可实现实时诊断、准确的佩戴定位和个性化医疗建议，有效缩小医院护理和家庭监控之间的差距。我们的工作提高了心脏护理的可及性，促进早期发现，并减轻医疗保健系统的负担。

articles.title: Versatile tunable optical injection of chiral polarized Weyl fermions in a magnetic Weyl semimetal Co3Sn2S2
articles.title_zh: 磁性韦尔半金属 Co3Sn2S2 中手性偏振韦尔费米子的多功能可调谐光学注入
articles.abstract: ABSTRACT Precise probe and control of various quantum degrees of freedom in novel quantum matters are central to understanding fundamental quantum physics and hold promise for innovative routes to encode and process information. Chirality is one such degree of freedom that has recently attracted intense research interest, especially for Weyl fermions in topological Weyl semimetals. The coupling of chiral degrees of freedom through light‒matter interactions and the versatile control of these couplings through external fields can lead to precise quantum control of Weyl fermions. In this work, we demonstrate the observation of light chirality-dependent photocurrent in the mid-infrared regime. Excitation wavelength-dependent measurements reveal that the photocurrent originates from the injection of chiral polarized Weyl fermions by chiral polarized mid-infrared photons. The optical process that generates unbalanced chiral polarized Weyl fermions is determined to be a third-order nonlinear photocurrent process. Compared with nonmagnetic Weyl semimetals, such coupling is tunable in a versatile manner in magnetic Weyl semimetals with the magnetization direction and external electric field in addition to the chirality of light. Our results are not only directly applicable to tunable circular-polarization-sensitive photodetection in the mid-infrared regime, but also pave the way toward functional quantum devices that utilize the chiral quantum degrees of freedom of Weyl fermions.
articles.abstract_zh: 摘要：对新型量子物质中各种量子自由度的精确探测和控制是理解基础量子物理学的核心，并有望为编码和处理信息的创新途径带来希望。手性就是这样一种自由度，最近引起了人们强烈的研究兴趣，特别是对于拓扑外尔半金属中的外尔费米子。通过光与物质相互作用的手性自由度耦合以及通过外部场对这些耦合的多功能控制可以实现外尔费米子的精确量子控制。在这项工作中，我们展示了在中红外区域观察光手性依赖的光电流。与激发波长相关的测量表明，光电流源自手性偏振中红外光子注入手性偏振韦尔费米子。产生不平衡手性偏振韦尔费米子的光学过程被确定为三阶非线性光电流过程。与非磁性韦尔半金属相比，磁性韦尔半金属中的这种耦合除了光的手性之外，还可以通过磁化方向和外部电场以多种方式进行调节。我们的结果不仅直接适用于中红外范围内的可调谐圆偏振敏感光电探测，而且还为利用外尔费米子手性量子自由度的功能量子器件铺平了道路。

articles.title: Deep learning predicts potential reassortments of avian H5N1 with human influenza viruses
articles.title_zh: 深度学习预测禽流感 H5N1 与人类流感病毒的潜在重组
articles.abstract: ABSTRACT Frequent infection cases with avian H5N1 influenza A viruses (IAVs) are posing pandemic risks of human/avian-reassorted IAVs. We aimed to build an attentional deep learning model named HAIRANGE, for predicting potentially human-adapted reassortment of H5N1 and human IAVs. A biologically relevant and non-pretrained embedder named Codon2Vec in HAIRANGE performed competitively in benchmarking against other embedders, such as ESM2, DNABERT2 and others, indicating a high association of genomic context with viral hosts or serotypes, for IAV RNA polymerase-related genes. HAIRANGE accurately predicted the adaptation of each polymerase-related gene and the adaptive polymerase-related gene reassortment with polymerase activity validated by in vitro reporting assay. Worryingly, an adaptive reassortment between avian H5N1 and human H3N2 IAVs was predicted by HAIRANGE and validated by polymerase activity assay. Summarily, HAIRANGE can predict adaptive IAV reassortment based on embedded genomic context. Current avian H5N1 IAV is posing pandemic potential via possible reassortment with human IAVs.
articles.abstract_zh: 摘要 禽类 H5N1 甲型流感病毒 (IAV) 频繁感染病例构成了人/禽重组 IAV 的大流行风险。我们的目标是建立一个名为 HAIRANGE 的注意力深度学习模型，用于预测 H5N1 和人类 IAV 的潜在人类适应重组。 HAIRANGE 中名为 Codon2Vec 的生物相关且非预训练的嵌入器在与其他嵌入器（例如 ESM2、DNABERT2 等）的基准测试中表现出竞争性，表明对于 IAV RNA 聚合酶相关基因，基因组背景与病毒宿主或血清型高度相关。 HAIRANGE 准确预测了每个聚合酶相关基因的适应性和适应性聚合酶相关基因重配，并通过体外报告测定验证了聚合酶活性。令人担忧的是，HAIRANGE 预测了禽类 H5N1 和人类 H3N2 IAV 之间的适应性重配，并通过聚合酶活性测定进行了验证。总之，HAIRANGE 可以根据嵌入的基因组背景预测适应性 IAV 重配。目前的禽类 H5N1 IAV 可能通过与人类 IAV 重组而造成大流行。

articles.title: Inhibition of SERT and NMDAR synergistically confers rapid antidepressant effects of ketamine
articles.title_zh: SERT 和 NMDAR 的抑制协同作用赋予氯胺酮快速抗抑郁作用
articles.abstract: ABSTRACT While N -methyl- d -aspartate receptor (NMDAR) blockade is crucial for the rapid antidepressant effects of ketamine, the involvement of other mechanisms remains contentious, particularly regarding the role of serotonin, a key neurotransmitter in the target of traditional antidepressants. Here, we demonstrate that ketamine elevates serotonin levels by inhibiting the serotonin transporter (SERT). A cryogenic electron microscopy structure of ketamine-bound SERT in the outward-open conformation, resolved at 3.2 Å, indicates that ketamine binds to the central site of SERT. Elevated serotonin, along with NMDAR inhibition, induces ketamine-like rapid antidepressant effects. This increase in serotonin leads to the activation of vasoactive intestinal peptide (VIP)-expressing interneurons, which are essential for the rapid antidepressant effects of ketamine. Inhibition of VIP neurons blocks these effects and ketamine-like effects, highlighting a crucial cell type-specific mechanism. These findings identify a critical pathway in the rapid antidepressant actions of ketamine and offer potential pharmacological strategies for developing rapidly acting antidepressants.
articles.abstract_zh: 摘要 虽然 N-甲基-d-天冬氨酸受体 (NMDAR) 阻断对于氯胺酮的快速抗抑郁作用至关重要，但其他机制的参与仍然存在争议，特别是关于传统抗抑郁药靶标中的关键神经递质血清素的作用。在这里，我们证明氯胺酮通过抑制血清素转运蛋白（SERT）来提高血清素水平。氯胺酮结合 SERT 向外开放构象的低温电子显微镜结构，分辨率为 3.2 Å，表明氯胺酮与 SERT 的中心位点结合。血清素升高与 NMDAR 抑制一起诱导氯胺酮样快速抗抑郁作用。血清素的增加导致表达血管活性肠肽（VIP）的中间神经元的激活，这对于氯胺酮的快速抗抑郁作用至关重要。 VIP 神经元的抑制可阻断这些效应和氯胺酮样效应，突出了关键的细胞类型特异性机制。这些发现确定了氯胺酮快速抗抑郁作用的关键途径，并为开发快速作用的抗抑郁药提供了潜在的药理学策略。

articles.title: Solar fusion III: New data and theory for hydrogen-burning stars
articles.title_zh: 太阳聚变 III：氢燃烧恒星的新数据和理论
articles.abstract: Author(s): B. Acharya et al. Approximately 90% of the stars in the Milky Way are on the main sequence, fusing hydrogen into helium through a network of nuclear reactions. This includes the nearest star, our Sun. A precise understanding of hydrogen burning is crucial to predicting its luminosity, neutrino production, and helioseismology. This review describes the theoretical and experimental work of the last decade that has advanced our understanding of the nuclear physics of hydrogen burning. It describes the plasma and atomic physics that influences the solar environment in which the nuclear reactions take place, as well as the diagnostics probes—including solar neutrinos and helioseismology—that allow us to test our resulting model of the solar interior. [Rev. Mod. Phys. 97, 035002] Published Thu Sep 04, 2025
articles.abstract_zh: 作者：B. Acharya 等人。银河系中大约 90% 的恒星位于主序带上，通过核反应网络将氢融合成氦。这包括最近的恒星，我们的太阳。准确了解氢燃烧对于预测其光度、中微子产生和日震学至关重要。这篇综述描述了过去十年的理论和实验工作，这些工作增进了我们对氢燃烧核物理的理解。它描述了影响发生核反应的太阳环境的等离子体和原子物理学，以及诊断探针（包括太阳中微子和日震学），使我们能够测试太阳内部的最终模型。 [牧师。模组。物理。 97, 035002] 于 2025 年 9 月 4 日星期四发布

articles.title: Photoinduced nonequilibrium states in Mott insulators
articles.title_zh: 莫特绝缘体中的光致非平衡态
articles.abstract: Author(s): Yuta Murakami, Denis Golež, Martin Eckstein, and Philipp Werner The interplay between nonequilibrium physics and strong electronic correlations offers a unique platform for manipulating material properties, exploring novel optical responses, and uncovering quantum metastable phases. This review provides a comprehensive overview of recent advances in understanding the nonequilibrium dynamics of photoexcited Mott insulators—systems where strong interactions and a robust energy gap can give rise to rich and controllable phenomena. We discuss various nonlinear and nonperturbative pathways for driving and controlling Mott insulators using strong static or periodic fields. Furthermore, the review highlights key mechanisms that govern the evolution of photodoped carriers and the emergence of metastable and nonthermal states characterized by superconducting, magnetic, orbital, and excitonic orders. [Rev. Mod. Phys. 97, 035001] Published Thu Jul 31, 2025
articles.abstract_zh: 作者：Yuta Murakami、Denis Golež、Martin Eckstein 和 Philipp Werner 非平衡物理与强电子相关性之间的相互作用为操纵材料特性、探索新颖的光学响应和揭示量子亚稳态相提供了一个独特的平台。这篇综述全面概述了理解光激发莫特绝缘体非平衡动力学的最新进展，在该系统中，强相互作用和强大的能隙可以产生丰富且可控的现象。我们讨论使用强静态或周期性场驱动和控制莫特绝缘体的各种非线性和非微扰路径。此外，该综述还强调了控制光电掺杂载流子演化以及以超导、磁、轨道和激子级为特征的亚稳态和非热态出现的关键机制。 [牧师。模组。物理。 97, 035001] 发布于 2025 年 7 月 31 日星期四
authors: Yuta Murakami, Denis Golež, Martin Eckstein, and Philipp Werner

articles.title: Colloquium : Quantum properties and functionalities of magnetic skyrmions
articles.title_zh: 座谈会：磁性斯格明子的量子特性和功能
articles.abstract: Author(s): Alexander P. Petrović, Christina Psaroudaki, Peter Fischer, Markus Garst, and Christos Panagopoulos Skyrmions are topological field configurations that were first discussed in the context of high-energy theory. In recent years, skyrmionic spin patterns in solid-state systems have received much attention, in part for their promising application potential. This Colloquium discusses quantum-mechanical aspects of such magnetic skyrmions, both for the interactions that underlie skyrmion formation and for quantum features of the skyrmions themselves. [Rev. Mod. Phys. 97, 031001] Published Tue Jul 08, 2025
articles.abstract_zh: 作者：Alexander P. Petrović、Christina Psaroudaki、Peter Fischer、Markus Garst 和 Christos Panagopoulos 斯格明子是首先在高能理论背景下讨论的拓扑场配置。近年来，固态系统中的斯格明子自旋模式受到了广泛关注，部分原因是它们具有广阔的应用潜力。本次研讨会讨论了此类磁性斯格明子的量子力学方面，包括斯格明子形成背后的相互作用以及斯格明子本身的量子特征。 [牧师。模组。物理。 97, 031001] 于 2025 年 7 月 8 日星期二发布
authors: Alexander P. Petrović, Christina Psaroudaki, Peter Fischer, Markus Garst, and Christos Panagopoulos
articles.journal: Recent Articles in Rev. Mod. Phys.

articles.title: Universality in driven open quantum matter
articles.title_zh: 驱动开放量子物质的普遍性
articles.abstract: Author(s): Lukas M. Sieberer, Michael Buchhold, Jamir Marino, and Sebastian Diehl Driven open many-body quantum systems give rise to nonequilibrium stationary states through the interplay of unitary Hamiltonian dynamics and dissipation, a key feature of modern experiments on light-driven solids and atomic ensembles. This review explores the different types of universal behavior that emerge in these states and their theoretical classification within nonequilibrium quantum field theory, emphasizing the role of symmetry, topology, and quantum state purity. [Rev. Mod. Phys. 97, 025004] Published Thu Jun 12, 2025
articles.abstract_zh: 作者：Lukas M. Sieberer、Michael Buchhold、Jamir Marino 和 Sebastian Diehl 驱动的开放多体量子系统通过酉哈密顿动力学和耗散的相互作用产生非平衡稳态，这是现代光驱动固体和原子系综实验的一个关键特征。这篇综述探讨了这些状态中出现的不同类型的普遍行为及其在非平衡量子场论中的理论分类，强调了对称性、拓扑和量子态纯度的作用。 [牧师。模组。物理。 97, 025004] 发布于 2025 年 6 月 12 日星期四
authors: Lukas M. Sieberer, Michael Buchhold, Jamir Marino, and Sebastian Diehl
articles.journal: Recent Articles in Rev. Mod. Phys.

articles.title: The Science of Nanostructure Acoustic Vibrations
articles.title_zh: 纳米结构声振动科学
articles.abstract: Ultrafast excitation of nanoparticles can excite the acoustic vibrational modes of the structure that correlate with the expansion coordinates. These modes are frequently seen in transient absorption experiments on metal nanoparticle samples and occasionally for semiconductors. The aim of this review is to give an overview of the physical chemistry of nanostructure acoustic vibrations. The issues discussed include the excitation mechanism, how to calculate the mode frequencies using continuum mechanics, and the factors that control vibrational damping. Recent results that demonstrate that the high frequencies inherent to the acoustic modes of nanomaterials trigger a viscoelastic response in surrounding liquids are also discussed, as well as vibrational coupling between nanostructures and mode hybridization within the nanostructures. Mode hybridization provides a way of manipulating the lifetimes of the acoustic modes, which is potentially useful for applications such as mass sensing.
articles.abstract_zh: 纳米颗粒的超快激发可以激发与膨胀坐标相关的结构的声振动模式。这些模式经常出现在金属纳米颗粒样品的瞬态吸收实验中，偶尔也出现在半导体的瞬态吸收实验中。本综述的目的是概述纳米结构声振动的物理化学。讨论的问题包括激励机制、如何使用连续介质力学计算模态频率以及控制振动阻尼的因素。最近的结果表明，纳米材料声学模式固有的高频会触发周围液体的粘弹性响应，以及纳米结构之间的振动耦合和纳米结构内的模式杂化。模式杂交提供了一种操纵声学模式寿命的方法，这对于质量传感等应用可能有用。
authors: Cameron Wright and Gregory V. Hartland

articles.title: Resolving Conformational Plasticity in Mammalian Cells with High-Resolution Fluorescence Tools
articles.title_zh: 使用高分辨率荧光工具解决哺乳动物细胞的构象可塑性
articles.abstract: Investigating protein dynamic structural changes is fundamental for understanding protein function, drug discovery, and disease mechanisms. Traditional studies of protein dynamics often rely on investigations of purified systems, which fail to capture the complexity of the cellular environment. The intracellular milieu imposes distinct physicochemical constraints that affect macromolecular interactions and dynamics in ways not easily replicated in isolated experimental setups. We discuss the use of fluorescence resonance energy transfer, fluorescence anisotropy, and minimal photon flux imaging technologies to address these challenges and directly investigate protein conformational dynamics in mammalian cells. Key findings from the application of these techniques demonstrate their potential to reveal intricate details of protein conformational plasticity. By overcoming the limitations of traditional in vitro methods, these approaches offer a more accurate and comprehensive understanding of protein function and behavior within the complex environment of mammalian cells.
articles.abstract_zh: 研究蛋白质动态结构变化对于理解蛋白质功能、药物发现和疾病机制至关重要。蛋白质动力学的传统研究通常依赖于纯化系统的研究，而这些系统无法捕捉细胞环境的复杂性。细胞内环境施加了独特的物理化学限制，这些限制以在孤立的实验装置中不易复制的方式影响大分子相互作用和动力学。我们讨论使用荧光共振能量转移、荧光各向异性和最小光子通量成像技术来应对这些挑战，并直接研究哺乳动物细胞中的蛋白质构象动力学。应用这些技术的主要发现证明了它们揭示蛋白质构象可塑性复杂细节的潜力。通过克服传统体外方法的局限性，这些方法可以更准确、更全面地了解哺乳动物细胞复杂环境中的蛋白质功能和行为。
authors: Hao Ruan and Edward A. Lemke

articles.title: Plasmon-Driven Chemistry
articles.title_zh: 等离激元驱动化学
articles.abstract: Plasmonic nanomaterials are promising photocatalysts due to their large optical cross sections and facile generation of nanoscale hotspot regions. They have been used to drive a range of photochemical reactions, including H 2 dissociation, CO 2 reduction, and ammonia synthesis, offering an exciting approach to light-driven chemistry. Deepening our understanding of how energy can be controllably transferred from the plasmonic nanomaterial to proximal reactants should lead to improvements in the efficiency and selectivity in plasmonic photocatalysis. Here we provide a comprehensive overview of plasmonic properties and explore different energy partitioning pathways. We focus on the importance of mapping molecular potential energy landscapes to understand reactivity and describe recent advancements in spectroscopic techniques, such as ultrafast surface-enhanced Raman spectroscopy, electron microscopy, and electrochemistry, that can aid in understanding how plasmonic nanomaterials can be used to shape potential energy surfaces and modify chemical outcomes. Additionally, we explore innovative hybrid plasmonic nanostructures such as antenna–reactor complexes, plasmonic single-atom catalysts, plasmonic picocavities, and chiral plasmonic substrates, all of which show great promise in advancing the field of plasmon-driven chemistry.
articles.abstract_zh: 等离激元纳米材料由于其较大的光学横截面和易于生成纳米级热点区域而成为有前途的光催化剂。它们已被用于驱动一系列光化学反应，包括H 2 解离、CO 2 还原和氨合成，为光驱动化学提供了一种令人兴奋的方法。加深我们对能量如何可控地从等离子体纳米材料转移到邻近反应物的理解应该会提高等离子体光催化的效率和选择性。在这里，我们提供等离子体特性的全面概述并探索不同的能量分配途径。我们重点关注绘制分子势能图谱以了解反应性的重要性，并描述光谱技术的最新进展，例如超快表面增强拉曼光谱、电子显微镜和电化学，这可以帮助理解如何使用等离子体纳米材料来塑造势能表面和改变化学结果。此外，我们还探索了创新的混合等离子体纳米结构，例如天线反应器复合物、等离子体单原子催化剂、等离子体皮腔和手性等离子体基底，所有这些都在推进等离子体驱动化学领域显示出巨大的前景。
authors: Arghya Sarkar, MaKenna M. Koble and Renee R. Frontiera

articles.title: Resolving the Solvation Structure and Transport Properties of Aqueous Zinc Electrolytes from Salt-in-Water to Water-in-Salt Using Neural Network Potential
articles.title_zh: 利用神经网络势解析水性锌电解质从水包盐到盐包水的溶剂化结构和传输特性
articles.abstract: Author(s): Chuntian Cao, Arun Kingan, Ryan C. Hill, Jason Kuang, Lei Wang, Chunyi Zhang, Matthew R. Carbone, Hubertus van Dam, Shinjae Yoo, Shan Yan, Esther S. Takeuchi, Kenneth J. Takeuchi, Xifan Wu, AM Milinda Abeykoon, Amy C. Marschilok, and Deyu Lu A neural network potential model is developed for ZnCl 2 electrolytes that provides atomic scale insights into the solvation structure and ionic conductivity. The results agree well with experiment and shed light on the performance of aqueous zinc-ion batteries across a wide concentration range of ZnCl 2 electrolytes. [PRX Energy 4, 023004] Published Fri Apr 11, 2025
articles.abstract_zh: 作者：Chuntian Cao、Arun Kingan、Ryan C. Hill、Jason Kuang、Lei Wang、Chunyi Zhang、Matthew R. Carbone、Hubertus van Dam、Shinjae Yoo、Shan Yan、Esther S. Takeuchi、Kenneth J. Takeuchi、Xifan Wu、AM Milinda Abeykoon、Amy C. Marschilok 和 Deyu Lu 针对 ZnCl 2 电解质开发了一个神经网络电势模型，该模型提供了原子尺度的见解溶剂化结构和离子电导率。结果与实验非常吻合，并揭示了水性锌离子电池在宽浓度范围的 ZnCl 2 电解质中的性能。 [PRX Energy 4, 023004] 发布于 2025 年 4 月 11 日星期五
authors: Chuntian Cao, Arun Kingan, Ryan C. Hill, Jason Kuang, Lei Wang, Chunyi Zhang, Matthew R. Carbone, Hubertus van Dam, Shinjae Yoo, Shan Yan, Esther S. Takeuchi, Kenneth J. Takeuchi, Xifan Wu, AM Milinda Abeykoon, Amy C. Marschilok, and Deyu Lu

articles.title: Crystal Structure Prediction and Phase Stability in Highly Anharmonic Silver-Based Chalcohalide Antiperovskites
articles.title_zh: 高非谐波银基硫卤化物反钙钛矿的晶体结构预测和相稳定性
articles.abstract: Author(s): Pol Benítez, Cibrán López, Cong Liu, Ivan Caño, Josep-Lluís Tamarit, Edgardo Saucedo, and Claudio Cazorla Using theoretical first-principles methods, stable and metastable phases of silver-based chalcohalide anti-perovskites are predicted, offering insight into their stability for potential energy and optoelectronic applications. [PRX Energy 4, 023002] Published Thu Apr 03, 2025
articles.abstract_zh: 作者：Pol Benítez、Cibrán López、Cong Liu、Ivan Caño、Josep-Lluís Tamarit、Edgardo Saucedo 和 Claudio Cazorla 使用理论第一原理方法，预测了银基硫卤化物反钙钛矿的稳定相和亚稳定相，从而深入了解其在势能和光电应用中的稳定性。 [PRX Energy 4, 023002] 2025 年 4 月 3 日星期四发布
authors: Pol Benítez, Cibrán López, Cong Liu, Ivan Caño, Josep-Lluís Tamarit, Edgardo Saucedo, and Claudio Cazorla

articles.title: Quantum-information methods for quantum gravity laboratory-based tests
articles.title_zh: 用于量子引力实验室测试的量子信息方法
articles.abstract: Author(s): Chiara Marletto and Vlatko Vedral It is conceptually possible that gravity is a force of nature that is not describable with a classical theory, but is also not described by a conventional quantum theory. Information-theoretic approaches make it possible to address this general idea in a concrete way, with thought experiments that would constrain the scope of whatever new theory emerges. This review gives the status of these new theoretical approaches, with an emphasis on proposed experiments that look for gravitationally induced entanglement (GIE) between two probes for which quantum theory is known to be applicable. Various potentially feasible tabletop-scale GIE experiments that have been proposed are concretely analyzed. [Rev. Mod. Phys. 97, 015006] Published Fri Mar 14, 2025
articles.abstract_zh: 作者：Chiara Marletto 和 Vlatko Vedral 从概念上讲，重力是一种无法用经典理论描述的自然力，但也不能用传统的量子理论描述。信息论方法使得以具体的方式解决这个一般想法成为可能，通过思想实验来限制任何新理论出现的范围。这篇综述给出了这些新理论方法的现状，重点是所提出的实验，这些实验寻找已知适用量子理论的两个探测器之间的引力诱导纠缠（GIE）。对已提出的各种可能可行的桌面规模 GIE 实验进行了具体分析。 [牧师。模组。物理。 97, 015006] 发布于 2025 年 3 月 14 日星期五
articles.journal: Recent Articles in Rev. Mod. Phys.

articles.title: Mechanical Memories in Solids, from Disorder to Design
articles.title_zh: 固体中的机械记忆，从无序到设计
articles.abstract: Solids are rigid, which means that when left undisturbed, their structures are nearly static. It follows that these structures depend on history—but it is surprising that they hold readable memories of past events. Here, we review the research that has recently flourished around mechanical memory formation, beginning with amorphous solids’ various memories of deformation and mesoscopic models based on particle rearrangements. We describe how these concepts apply to a much wider range of solids and glassy matter, and how they are a bridge to memory and physical computing in mechanical metamaterials. An understanding of memory in all these solids can potentially be the basis for designing or training functionality into materials. Just as important is memory's value for understanding matter whenever it is complex, frustrated, and out of equilibrium.
articles.abstract_zh: 固体是刚性的，这意味着当不受干扰时，它们的结构几乎是静态的。由此可见，这些结构依赖于历史——但令人惊讶的是，它们保存着对过去事件的可读记忆。在这里，我们回顾了最近围绕机械记忆形成蓬勃发展的研究，首先是非晶固体的各种变形记忆和基于粒子重排的介观模型。我们描述了这些概念如何应用于更广泛的固体和玻璃物质，以及它们如何成为机械超材料中内存和物理计算的桥梁。对所有这些固体中的记忆的理解可能成为设计或训练材料功能的基础。同样重要的是，当事物复杂、受挫和失去平衡时，记忆对于理解事物的价值也很重要。
authors: Joseph D. Paulsen and Nathan C. Keim

articles.title: Quantum Liquids: Emergent Higher-Rank Gauge Theory and Fractons
articles.title_zh: 量子液体：新兴的高阶规范理论和分式
articles.abstract: Fractons emerge from many-body systems, featuring subdimensional particles with restricted mobility. These particles have attracted interest for their roles across disciplines, including topological quantum codes, quantum field theory, emergent gravity, and quantum information. They display unique nonequilibrium behaviors such as nonergodicity and glassy dynamics. This review offers a structured overview of fracton phenomena, especially those of gapless fracton liquids, which enable collective modes similar to gauge fluctuations in Maxwell's electromagnetic framework, yet their phenomena are distinguished by a unique conservation law that restricts the mobility of individual charges and monopoles. We delve into the theoretical basis of three-dimensional (3D) fracton liquids, exploring emergent symmetric tensor gauge theories and their properties. We also discuss the material realization of fracton liquids in Yb-based pyrochlore lattices and other synthetic quantum matter platforms.
articles.abstract_zh: 分形子是从多体系统中产生的，具有移动性受限的亚维粒子。这些粒子因其在拓扑量子代码、量子场论、涌现引力和量子信息等跨学科中的作用而引起了人们的兴趣。它们表现出独特的非平衡行为，例如非遍历性和玻璃动力学。这篇综述提供了分形现象的结构化概述，特别是无间隙分形液体的分形现象，其使得类似于麦克斯韦电磁框架中的规范涨落的集体模式成为可能，但它们的现象以限制单个电荷和单极子移动性的独特守恒定律为特征。我们深入研究三维（3D）分形液体的理论基础，探索新兴的对称张量规范理论及其性质。我们还讨论了基于镱基烧绿石晶格和其他合成量子物质平台中分形液体的材料实现。

articles.title: Spatial Atomic Layer Deposition for Energy and Electronic Devices
articles.title_zh: 用于能源和电子设备的空间原子层沉积
articles.abstract: Author(s): Robert L.Z. Hoye, David Muñoz-Rojas, Zhuotong Sun, Hayri Okcu, Hatameh Asgarimoghaddam, Judith L. MacManus-Driscoll, and Kevin P. Musselman This Review describes the promise of atmospheric pressure spatial atomic layer deposition (SALD) for the precise manufacture of thin films at scale. Case studies of SALD for energy conversion and storage and electronic devices are presented, and the potential of SALD for emerging technologies is discussed. [PRX Energy 4, 017002] Published Wed Feb 19, 2025
articles.abstract_zh: 作者：罗伯特·L.Z. Hoye、David Muñoz-Rojas、Zhuotong Sun、Hayri Okcu、Hatameh Asgarimoghaddam、Judith L. MacManus-Driscoll 和 Kevin P. Musselman 这篇综述描述了大气压空间原子层沉积 (SALD) 在大规模精确制造薄膜方面的前景。介绍了 SALD 在能量转换和存储以及电子设备方面的案例研究，并讨论了 SALD 在新兴技术方面的潜力。 [PRX Energy 4, 017002] 2025 年 2 月 19 日星期三发布
authors: Robert L.Z. Hoye, David Muñoz-Rojas, Zhuotong Sun, Hayri Okcu, Hatameh Asgarimoghaddam, Judith L. MacManus-Driscoll, and Kevin P. Musselman

articles.title: Detecting Attacks and Estimating States of Power Grids from Partial Observations with Machine Learning
articles.title_zh: 利用机器学习从部分观察中检测攻击并估计电网状态
articles.abstract: Author(s): Zheng-Meng Zhai, Mohammadamin Moradi, and Ying-Cheng Lai Using data-driven machine learning models, this work demonstrates a method to map the dynamical state of a full power grid from limited observations, enabling the user to locate disruptions with information only from other areas of the grid. [PRX Energy 4, 013003] Published Tue Feb 04, 2025
articles.abstract_zh: 作者：Zheng-Meng Zhai、Mohammadamin Moradi 和 Ying-Cheng Lai 使用数据驱动的机器学习模型，演示了一种根据有限的观测来绘制完整电网动态状态的方法，使用户能够仅通过来自电网其他区域的信息来定位中断。 [PRX Energy 4, 013003] 2025 年 2 月 4 日星期二发布
authors: Zheng-Meng Zhai, Mohammadamin Moradi, and Ying-Cheng Lai

articles.title: 3D Reconstruction of a Nuclear Reactor by Muon Tomography: Structure Validation and Anomaly Detection
articles.title_zh: 通过 μ 子层析成像技术重建核反应堆：结构验证和异常检测
articles.abstract: Author(s): Baptiste Lefevre, Julien Vogel, Héctor Gomez, David Attié, Laurent Gallego, Philippe Gonzales, Bertrand Lesage, Philippe Mas, and Daniel Pomarède Muon tomography, a non-invasive technique that can be used to image large, inaccessible structures, is combined with machine learning to create a 3D reconstruction of a historical nuclear reactor that reveals material density variations, including potential anomalies in the graphite core. [PRX Energy 4, 013002] Published Tue Jan 28, 2025
articles.abstract_zh: 作者：Baptiste Lefevre、Julien Vogel、Héctor Gomez、David Attié、Laurent Gallego、Philippe Gonzales、Bertrand Lesage、Philippe Mas 和 Daniel Pomarède Muon 断层扫描是一种非侵入性技术，可用于对大型、难以接近的结构进行成像，与机器学习相结合，创建历史核反应堆的 3D 重建，揭示材料密度变化，包括石墨芯。 [PRX Energy 4, 013002] 2025 年 1 月 28 日星期二发布
authors: Baptiste Lefevre, Julien Vogel, Héctor Gomez, David Attié, Laurent Gallego, Philippe Gonzales, Bertrand Lesage, Philippe Mas, and Daniel Pomarède

articles.title: Macroscopic stochastic thermodynamics
articles.title_zh: 宏观随机热力学
articles.abstract: Author(s): Gianmaria Falasco and Massimiliano Esposito This review bridges the mesoscopic world of stochastic thermodynamics, defined by Markov jump processes, with the deterministic and extensive thermodynamic laws that emerge at the macroscopic scale. Using large deviations theory, it constructs a fluctuation framework preserving core principles like the fluctuation theorem. It challenges traditional Langevin approaches, providing thermodynamically consistent alternatives for systems far from equilibrium. From chemical reaction networks to electronic circuits and Potts models, this work elucidates the dynamics of rare fluctuations, attractor transitions, and entropy production principles, offering a robust theoretical foundation for understanding nonequilibrium phenomena across disciplines. [Rev. Mod. Phys. 97, 015002] Published Wed Jan 22, 2025
articles.abstract_zh: 作者：Gianmaria Falasco 和 Massimiliano Esposito 这篇综述将由马尔可夫跳跃过程定义的随机热力学介观世界与宏观尺度上出现的确定性和广泛的热力学定律联系起来。利用大偏差理论，构建了一个保留波动定理等核心原理的波动框架。它挑战了传统的朗之万方法，为远离平衡的系统提供了热力学一致的替代方案。从化学反应网络到电子电路和波茨模型，这项工作阐明了罕见波动、吸引子跃迁和熵产生原理的动力学，为理解跨学科的非平衡现象提供了坚实的理论基础。 [牧师。模组。物理。 97, 015002] 2025 年 1 月 22 日星期三发布
articles.journal: Recent Articles in Rev. Mod. Phys.

articles.title: Determining Parameters of Metal-Halide Perovskites Using Photoluminescence with Bayesian Inference
articles.title_zh: 利用光致发光和贝叶斯推理确定金属卤化物钙钛矿的参数
