Snaith Experiment and machine learning are combined to extract key material parameters and insight into charge carrier transport in metal halide perovskites for solar cell applications. [PRX Energy 4, 013001] Published Tue Jan 14, 2025
articles.abstract_zh: 作者：Manuel Koher-Czerny、Akash Dasgupta、Seongrok Seo、Florine M. Rombach、David P. McMeekin、Heon Jin 和 Henry J. Snaith 将实验和机器学习相结合，提取关键材料参数并深入了解太阳能电池应用的金属卤化物钙钛矿中的载流子传输。 [PRX Energy 4, 013001] 2025 年 1 月 14 日星期二发布
authors: Manuel Kober-Czerny, Akash Dasgupta, Seongrok Seo, Florine M. Rombach, David P. McMeekin, Heon Jin, and Henry J. Snaith

articles.title: Kinetic solitary electrostatic structures in collisionless plasma: Phase-space holes
articles.title_zh: 无碰撞等离子体中的动力学孤立静电结构：相空间孔
articles.abstract: Author(s): I. H. Hutchinson Plasma is usually taught to be a quasineutral gas of charged and neutral particles that exhibits collective behavior. However, satellites regularly observe solitary potential structures in space plasmas that are isolated positive or negative potential humps, called electron or ion holes. In the 1970s, laboratory observations were made of electron holes. This review presents an overview of the observation of these electrostatic structures and presents their origin and their stability, using analytic theory and simulations. The role of kinetically unstable velocity distributions is identified as a key driver. [Rev. Mod. Phys. 96, 045007] Published Tue Dec 10, 2024
articles.abstract_zh: 作者：I. H. Hutchinson 等离子体通常被认为是一种由带电粒子和中性粒子组成的准中性气体，具有集体行为。然而，卫星定期观察空间等离子体中的孤立电势结构，这些结构是孤立的正电势或负电势驼峰，称为电子或离子空穴。 20 世纪 70 年代，实验室对电子空穴进行了观测。这篇综述概述了这些静电结构的观察，并利用分析理论和模拟介绍了它们的起源和稳定性。动力学不稳定的速度分布的作用被认为是关键驱动因素。 [牧师。模组。物理。 96, 045007] 发布于 2024 年 12 月 10 日星期二
articles.journal: Recent Articles in Rev. Mod. Phys.

articles.title: Variants of Surface Charges and Capacitances in Electrocatalysis: Insights from Density-Potential Functional Theory Embedded with an Implicit Chemisorption Model
articles.title_zh: 电催化中表面电荷和电容的变体：嵌入隐式化学吸附模型的密度势泛函理论的见解
articles.abstract: Author(s): Jun Huang, Fabiola Domínguez-Flores, and Marko Melander A model of the local reaction environment at the electrocatalytic solid-liquid interface is presented which accounts for potential-dependent adsorbate coverages and its influence on the surface charge density and differential capacitances. [PRX Energy 3, 043008] Published Fri Nov 15, 2024
articles.abstract_zh: 作者：Jun Huang、Fabiola Domínguez-Flores 和 Marko Melander 提出了电催化固液界面局部反应环境的模型，该模型解释了电位依赖性吸附物覆盖率及其对表面电荷密度和微分电容的影响。 [PRX Energy 3, 043008] 2024 年 11 月 15 日星期五发布
authors: Jun Huang, Fabiola Domínguez-Flores, and Marko Melander

articles.title: Synchronized States of Power Grids and Oscillator Networks by Convex Optimization
articles.title_zh: 通过凸优化实现电网和振荡器网络的同步状态
articles.abstract: Author(s): Carsten Hartmann, Philipp C. Böttcher, David Gross, and Dirk Witthaut To avoid power disruptions, all generators in a power grid must be synchronized. Here, the authors propose a mathematical approach to calculate all stable states of the lossless real power flow equations, which provide insights into the widely used linear power flow approximation and factors that limit the stability of power grids. [PRX Energy 3, 043004] Published Thu Oct 31, 2024
articles.abstract_zh: 作者：Carsten Hartmann、Philipp C. Böttcher、David Gross 和 Dirk Witthaut 为了避免电力中断，电网中的所有发电机必须同步。在这里，作者提出了一种数学方法来计算无损有功潮流方程的所有稳定状态，这为深入了解广泛使用的线性潮流近似和限制电网稳定性的因素提供了见解。 [PRX Energy 3, 043004] 2024 年 10 月 31 日星期四发布
authors: Carsten Hartmann, Philipp C. Böttcher, David Gross, and Dirk Witthaut

articles.title: $\mathcal{PT}$-symmetric quantum mechanics
articles.title_zh: $\mathcal{PT}$-对称量子力学
articles.abstract: Author(s): Carl M. Bender and Daniel W. Hook It is generally assumed that a Hamiltonian for a physically acceptable quantum system (one that has a positive-definite spectrum and obeys the requirement of unitarity) must be Hermitian. However, a $\mathcal{PT}$-symmetric Hamiltonian can also define a physically acceptable quantum-mechanical syste… [Rev. Mod. Phys. 96, 045002] Published Mon Oct 28, 2024
articles.abstract_zh: 作者：Carl M. Bender 和 Daniel W. Hook 通常认为，物理上可接受的量子系统（具有正定谱并遵守幺正性要求的系统）的哈密顿量必须是厄米式的。然而，$\mathcal{PT}$对称哈密顿量也可以定义物理上可接受的量子力学系统...... [Rev.模组。物理。 96, 045002] 于 2024 年 10 月 28 日星期一发布
authors: Carl M. Bender and Daniel W. Hook
articles.journal: Recent Articles in Rev. Mod. Phys.

articles.title: Designing $\mathrm{Ta}\mathrm{C}$ Virtual Substrates for Vertical ${\mathrm{Al}}_{x}{\mathrm{Ga}}_{1−x}\mathrm{N}$ Power Electronics Devices
articles.title_zh: 设计垂直 ${\mathrm{Al}}_{x}{\mathrm{Ga}}_{1−x}\mathrm{N}$ 电力电子器件的 $\mathrm{Ta}\mathrm{C}$ 虚拟基板
articles.abstract: Author(s): Dennice M. Roberts, Jordan A. Hachtel, Nancy M. Haegel, Moira K. Miller, Anthony D. Rice, and M. Brooks Tellekamp As technologies shift toward electrification, this study introduces TaC thin films as effective templates for AlGaN growth to address synthesis challenges and potentially advance power electronics. [PRX Energy 3, 033007] Published Fri Sep 27, 2024
articles.abstract_zh: 作者： Dennice M. Roberts、Jordan A. Hachtel、Nancy M. Haegel、Moira K. Miller、Anthony D. Rice 和 M. Brooks Tellekamp 随着技术向电气化方向发展，这项研究引入了 TaC 薄膜作为 AlGaN 生长的有效模板，以解决合成挑战并有可能推进电力电子技术的发展。 [PRX Energy 3, 033007] 2024 年 9 月 27 日星期五发布
authors: Dennice M. Roberts, Jordan A. Hachtel, Nancy M. Haegel, Moira K. Miller, Anthony D. Rice, and M. Brooks Tellekamp

articles.title: Semiconducting Heusler Compounds beyond the Slater-Pauling Rule
articles.title_zh: 超越斯莱特-鲍林规则的半导体赫斯勒化合物
articles.abstract: Author(s): Michael Parzer, Fabian Garmroudi, Alexander Riss, Michele Reticcioli, Raimund Podloucky, Michael Stöger-Pollach, Evan Constable, Andrej Pustogow, Takao Mori, and Ernst Bauer A series of strongly off-stoichiometric Heusler compounds have been discovered to be semiconducting and nonmagnetic, deviating from established electron counting rules. Their promising thermoelectric properties highlight potential for energy conversion applications. [PRX Energy 3, 033006] Published Fri Sep 20, 2024
articles.abstract_zh: 作者：Michael Parzer、Fabian Garmroudi、Alexander Riss、Michele Reticcioli、Raimund Podloucky、Michael Stöger-Pollach、Evan Constable、Andrej Pustogow、Takao Mori 和 Ernst Bauer 一系列强非化学计量的 Heusler 化合物被发现具有半导体性和非磁性，偏离既定的电子计数规则。它们具有前景的热电特性凸显了能量转换应用的潜力。 [PRX Energy 3, 033006] 2024 年 9 月 20 日星期五发布
authors: Michael Parzer, Fabian Garmroudi, Alexander Riss, Michele Reticcioli, Raimund Podloucky, Michael Stöger-Pollach, Evan Constable, Andrej Pustogow, Takao Mori, and Ernst Bauer

articles.title: From Design to Device: Challenges and Opportunities in Computational Discovery of $p$-Type Transparent Conductors
articles.title_zh: 从设计到器件：$p$型透明导体计算发现的挑战和机遇
articles.abstract: Author(s): Rachel Woods-Robinson, Monica Morales-Masis, Geoffroy Hautier, and Andrea Crovetto Using p-type transparent conductors for next-generation photovoltaics as a case study, this Perspective describes common pitfalls and potential solutions on the path from computational prediction of a new material to its integration in a commercial device. [PRX Energy 3, 031001] Published Mon Aug 05, 2024
articles.abstract_zh: 作者：Rachel Woods-Robinson、Monica Morales-Masis、Geoffroy Hautier 和 Andrea Crovetto 以下一代光伏发电的 p 型透明导体作为案例研究，本视角描述了从新材料的计算预测到其在商业设备中集成的过程中的常见陷阱和潜在解决方案。 [PRX Energy 3, 031001] 2024 年 8 月 5 日星期一发布
authors: Rachel Woods-Robinson, Monica Morales-Masis, Geoffroy Hautier, and Andrea Crovetto

articles.title: DuraMAT: Building a Consortium to Accelerate the Photovoltaic Module Reliability Learning Cycle
articles.title_zh: DuraMAT：建立联盟以加速光伏模块可靠性学习周期
articles.abstract: Author(s): Michael Owen-Bellini, James Y. Hartley, Anubhav Jain, Dirk C. Jordan, Laura T. Schelhas, and Teresa M. Barnes In this Perspective, the authors demonstrate the value of a collaborative, multidisciplinary approach to accelerate reliability testing for photovoltaic modules and discuss important directions for future development. [PRX Energy 3, 021001] Published Mon Jun 24, 2024
articles.abstract_zh: 作者：Michael Owen-Bellini、James Y. Hartley、Anubhav Jain、Dirk C. Jordan、Laura T. Schelhas 和 Teresa M. Barnes 在这一视角中，作者展示了协作、多学科方法在加速光伏组件可靠性测试方面的价值，并讨论了未来发展的重要方向。 [PRX Energy 3, 021001] 于 2024 年 6 月 24 日星期一发布
authors: Michael Owen-Bellini, James Y. Hartley, Anubhav Jain, Dirk C. Jordan, Laura T. Schelhas, and Teresa M. Barnes

articles.title: Magnetothermopower of Nodal-Line Semimetals
articles.title_zh: 节线半金属的磁热电势
articles.abstract: Author(s): Poulomi Chakraborty, Aaron Hui, Grigory Bednik, and Brian Skinner This work provides theoretical calculations of the Seebeck and Nernst coefficients of nodal line semimetals as a function of temperature and applied magnetic field, finding a remarkable enhancement of the magnetothermoelectric performance at low temperature relative to other materials. [PRX Energy 3, 023007] Published Thu Jun 20, 2024
articles.abstract_zh: 作者：Poulomi Chakraborty、Aaron Hui、Grigory Bednik 和 Brian Skinner 这项工作提供了节线半金属的塞贝克和能斯特系数作为温度和外加磁场函数的理论计算，发现相对于其他材料，低温下磁热电性能显着增强。 [PRX Energy 3, 023007] 发布于 2024 年 6 月 20 日星期四
authors: Poulomi Chakraborty, Aaron Hui, Grigory Bednik, and Brian Skinner

articles.title: Learning Molecular Mixture Property Using Chemistry-Aware Graph Neural Network
articles.title_zh: 使用化学感知图神经网络学习分子混合物性质
articles.abstract: Author(s): Hengrui Zhang (张恒睿), Tianxing Lai (来天行), Jie Chen, Arumugam Manthiram, James M. Rondinelli, and Wei Chen MolSets, a machine learning model that integrates graph neural networks with permutation invariant architecture, addresses multilevel complexity for effective prediction of molecular mixture properties, thus accelerating lithium battery electrolyte design. [PRX Energy 3, 023006] Published Wed Jun 12, 2024
articles.abstract_zh: 作者：张恒睿、来天行、Jie Chen、Arumugam Manthiram、James M. Rondinelli 和 Wei Chen MolSets 是一种将图神经网络与排列不变架构相结合的机器学习模型，解决了有效预测分子混合物特性的多级复杂性，从而加速了锂电池电解质的设计。 [PRX Energy 3, 023006] 2024 年 6 月 12 日星期三发布
authors: Hengrui Zhang (张恒睿), Tianxing Lai (来天行), Jie Chen, Arumugam Manthiram, James M. Rondinelli, and Wei Chen

articles.title: Generating Synthetic Power Grids Using Exponential Random Graph Models
articles.title_zh: 使用指数随机图模型生成合成电网
articles.abstract: Author(s): Francesco Giacomarra, Gianmarco Bet, and Alessandro Zocca Overcoming the limited availability of power network data is key to ensuring power grid reliability and sustainability. Using an Exponential Random Graph model, a versatile method is introduced for creating synthetic power grids that capture complex topological features of real grids with high accuracy. [PRX Energy 3, 023005] Published Thu Jun 06, 2024
articles.abstract_zh: 作者：Francesco Giacomara、Gianmarco Bet 和 Alessandro Zocca 克服电网数据可用性有限的问题是确保电网可靠性和可持续性的关键。使用指数随机图模型，引入了一种用于创建合成电网的通用方法，该方法可以高精度地捕获真实电网的复杂拓扑特征。 [PRX Energy 3, 023005] 发布于 2024 年 6 月 6 日星期四
authors: Francesco Giacomarra, Gianmarco Bet, and Alessandro Zocca

articles.title: Anomalous Photocurrent Reversal for the Same Polarization Direction in van der Waals Ferroelectric ${\mathrm{Cu}\mathrm{In}\mathrm{P}}_{2}{\mathrm{S}}_{6}$
articles.title_zh: 范德华铁电体中相同极化方向的反常光电流反转 ${\mathrm{Cu}\mathrm{In}\mathrm{P}}_{2}{\mathrm{S}}_{6}$
articles.abstract: Author(s): Yinxin Bai, Wei Hao, Yanghe Wang, Junjiang Tian, Chuanshou Wang, Yunlin Lei, Yihao Yang, Xiaodong Yao, Qihang Liu, Changjian Li, Mingqiang Gu, and Junling Wang Combined experimental and theoretical studies on the bulk photovoltaic effect in a van der Waals ferroelectric material reveal decoupling of the photocurrent and spontaneous polarization directions, which could have implications for photoelectric applications. [PRX Energy 3, 023004] Published Tue May 21, 2024
articles.abstract_zh: 作者：Yinxin Bai、Wei Ha、Yanghe Wang、Jun Jiang Tian、Chuanshou Wang、Yunlin Lei、Yihao Yang、Xiaodong Yao、Qihang Liu、Changjian Li、Mingqiang Gu 和 Junling Wang 对范德华铁电材料中体光伏效应的联合实验和理论研究揭示了光电流和自发极化方向的解耦，这可能对光电应用产生影响。 [PRX Energy 3, 023004] 2024 年 5 月 21 日星期二发布
authors: Yinxin Bai, Wei Hao, Yanghe Wang, Junjiang Tian, Chuanshou Wang, Yunlin Lei, Yihao Yang, Xiaodong Yao, Qihang Liu, Changjian Li, Mingqiang Gu, and Junling Wang

articles.title: Single-molecule scale magnetic resonance spectroscopy using quantum diamond sensors
articles.title_zh: 使用量子金刚石传感器的单分子尺度磁共振波谱
articles.abstract: Author(s): Jiangfeng Du, Fazhan Shi, Xi Kong, Fedor Jelezko, and Jörg Wrachtrup Nitrogen-vacancy centers in diamond are sensitive to magnetic fields, and a single center permits detection of electron and nuclear spins and imaging of single molecules in its vicinity. This article reviews the achievements of advanced methods to obtain spectral and spatial resolution and it points to technical problems that remain to be solved for widespread and multidisciplinary adoption of single-molecule magnetic resonance spectroscopy. [Rev. Mod. Phys. 96, 025001] Published Wed May 08, 2024
articles.abstract_zh: 作者：Jiangfeng Du、Fazhan Shi、Xi Kong、Fedor Jelezko 和 Jörg Wrachtrup 金刚石中的氮空位中心对磁场敏感，单个中心允许检测电子和核自旋以及对其附近的单个分子进行成像。本文回顾了获得光谱和空间分辨率的先进方法所取得的成就，并指出了单分子磁共振波谱的广泛和多学科应用仍有待解决的技术问题。 [牧师。模组。物理。 96, 025001] 2024 年 5 月 8 日星期三发布
authors: Jiangfeng Du, Fazhan Shi, Xi Kong, Fedor Jelezko, and Jörg Wrachtrup
articles.journal: Recent Articles in Rev. Mod. Phys.

articles.title: Colloquium : Magnetotactic bacteria: From flagellar motor to collective effects
articles.title_zh: 座谈会：趋磁细菌：从鞭毛运动到集体效应
articles.abstract: Author(s): M. Marmol, E. Gachon, and D. Faivre Magnetotactic bacteria have a built-in compass, in the form of a magnetosome chain made up of magnetic biominerals, that allows them to passively align along terrestrial magnetic field lines. They also sense oxygen gradients and swim using at least one flagellum. Hence, these bacteria are self-propelled active matter capable of displaying flocking behavior. This Colloquium explains the physics behind these various capabilities, as well as their interactions and biological significance. [Rev. Mod. Phys. 96, 021001] Published Thu Apr 04, 2024
articles.abstract_zh: 作者：M. Marmol、E. Gachon 和 D. Faivre 趋磁细菌有一个内置指南针，其形式是由磁性生物矿物质组成的磁小体链，使它们能够沿着地球磁场线被动排列。它们还能感知氧气梯度并使用至少一根鞭毛游泳。因此，这些细菌是能够表现出聚集行为的自驱动活性物质。本次研讨会解释了这些不同能力背后的物理原理，以及它们的相互作用和生物学意义。 [牧师。模组。物理。 96, 021001] 发布于 2024 年 4 月 4 日星期四
authors: M. Marmol, E. Gachon, and D. Faivre
articles.journal: Recent Articles in Rev. Mod. Phys.

articles.title: Electrical control of magnetism by electric field and current-induced torques
articles.title_zh: 通过电场和电流感应扭矩对磁力进行电气控制
articles.abstract: Author(s): Albert Fert, Ramamoorthy Ramesh, Vincent Garcia, Fèlix Casanova, and Manuel Bibes Electronic devices that incorporate magnetism, called spintronic devices, can increase the functionality of electronic circuits and lead to increases in efficiency. Such devices are useful if the magnetization can be manipulated electrically rather than by magnetic fields. This review covers the materials, underlying physics, and applications involved in such manipulation, focusing on two control mechanisms. The first is control by manipulating the magnetization through its coupling to ferroelectric order and the second is control by spin-polarized currents manipulating the magnetization through the angular momentum flowing into it. [Rev. Mod. Phys. 96, 015005] Published Wed Mar 13, 2024
articles.abstract_zh: 作者：Albert Fert、Ramamoorthy Ramesh、Vincent Garcia、Fèlix Casanova 和 Manuel Bibes 包含磁性的电子设备（称为自旋电子设备）可以增强电子电路的功能并提高效率。如果磁化可以通过电而不是磁场来操纵，那么这种装置是有用的。本综述涵盖了此类操纵所涉及的材料、基础物理和应用，重点关注两种控制机制。第一种是通过与铁电序的耦合来操纵磁化强度，第二种是通过自旋极化电流通过流入磁化强度的角动量来操纵磁化强度来进行控制。 [牧师。模组。物理。 96, 015005] 2024 年 3 月 13 日星期三发布
authors: Albert Fert, Ramamoorthy Ramesh, Vincent Garcia, Fèlix Casanova, and Manuel Bibes
articles.journal: Recent Articles in Rev. Mod. Phys.

articles.title: Controlling mass and energy diffusion with metamaterials
articles.title_zh: 用超材料控制质量和能量扩散
articles.abstract: Author(s): Fubao Yang, Zeren Zhang, Liujun Xu, Zhoufei Liu, Peng Jin, Pengfei Zhuang, Min Lei, Jinrong Liu, Jian-Hua Jiang, Xiaoping Ouyang, Fabio Marchesoni, and Jiping Huang Metamaterials are artificially patterned structures designed to behave as artificial materials with novel properties. A popular application is controlling electromagnetic waves with subwavelength patterning, leading to properties like negative indices of refraction. Metamaterials can also control diffusion processes, which are different from wave propagation. This review describes metamaterials in diffusive systems in terms of their underlying physics, the theory used to describe them, and their potential applications in areas such as heat management, drug transport, and particle separation. [Rev. Mod. Phys. 96, 015002] Published Wed Feb 14, 2024
articles.abstract_zh: 作者：Fubao Yang、Zeren 张、Liujun Xu、Zhoufei Liu、Peng Jin、Pengfei Zhuang、Min Lei、Jinrong Liu、Jian-Hua Jiang、Xiaoping Ouyang、Fabio Marchesoni 和 Jiping Huang 超材料是人工图案结构，旨在充当具有新颖特性的人造材料。一种流行的应用是通过亚波长图案控制电磁波，从而产生负折射率等特性。超材料还可以控制与波传播不同的扩散过程。这篇综述描述了扩散系统中的超材料的基础物理、用于描述它们的理论以及它们在热管理、药物传输和颗粒分离等领域的潜在应用。 [牧师。模组。物理。 96, 015002] 2024 年 2 月 14 日星期三发布
authors: Fubao Yang, Zeren Zhang, Liujun Xu, Zhoufei Liu, Peng Jin, Pengfei Zhuang, Min Lei, Jinrong Liu, Jian-Hua Jiang, Xiaoping Ouyang, Fabio Marchesoni, and Jiping Huang
articles.journal: Recent Articles in Rev. Mod. Phys.

articles.title: Colloquium : Sliding and pinning in structurally lubric 2D material interfaces
articles.title_zh: 座谈会：结构润滑二维材料界面中的滑动和钉扎
articles.abstract: Author(s): Jin Wang, Ali Khosravi, Andrea Vanossi, and Erio Tosatti Friction at highly lubric interfaces of two-dimensional materials is important yet incompletely characterized. This Colloquium discusses sliding and pinning between two-dimensional layers, using simulations of twisted graphene interfaces as a prototypical system. The resulting insights are of potential relevance for a larger category of bilayer and multilayer systems as well. [Rev. Mod. Phys. 96, 011002] Published Wed Feb 07, 2024
articles.abstract_zh: 作者：Jin Wang、Ali Khosravi、Andrea Vanossi 和 Erio Tosatti 二维材料高润滑界面的摩擦很重要，但尚未完全表征。本次研讨会使用扭曲石墨烯界面的模拟作为原型系统，讨论二维层之间的滑动和钉扎。由此产生的见解对于更大类别的双层和多层系统也具有潜在的相关性。 [牧师。模组。物理。 96, 011002] 2024 年 2 月 7 日星期三发布
authors: Jin Wang, Ali Khosravi, Andrea Vanossi, and Erio Tosatti
articles.journal: Recent Articles in Rev. Mod. Phys.

articles.title: Proton imaging of high-energy-density laboratory plasmas
articles.title_zh: 高能量密度实验室等离子体的质子成像
articles.abstract: Author(s): Derek B. Schaeffer, Archie F. A. Bott, Marco Borghesi, Kirk A. Flippo, William Fox, Julien Fuchs, Chikang Li, Fredrick H. Séguin, Hye-Sook Park, Petros Tzeferacos, and Louise Willingale Probing of electromagnetic fields in high-energy-density experiments is key to understanding questions in fusion processes such as how the fields are compressed, diffuse through the plasma, and can seed instabilities. Many kinetic processes studied, including collisionless shocks, filamentary instabilities, jets, magnetic reconnection, and turbulence, all depend on the field structure. In this review, an overview of experimental techniques and the underpinning theoretical principles and modeling of proton-based imaging is presented, followed by a review of experiments and an outlook for future frontiers in the technique. [Rev. Mod. Phys. 95, 045007] Published Thu Dec 28, 2023
articles.abstract_zh: 作者：Derek B. Schaeffer、Archie F. A. Bott、Marco Borghesi、Kirk A. Flippo、William Fox、Julien Fuchs、Chikang Li、Fredrick H. Séguin、Hye-Sook Park、Petros Tzeferacos 和 Louise Willingale 在高能量密度实验中探测电磁场是理解聚变过程中问题的关键，例如场如何被压缩、通过等离子体扩散以及如何产生种子不稳定。研究的许多动力学过程，包括无碰撞冲击、丝状不稳定性、喷流、磁重联和湍流，都取决于场结构。在这篇综述中，概述了实验技术以及质子成像的基础理论原理和建模，随后回顾了实验并对该技术的未来前沿进行了展望。 [牧师。模组。物理。 95, 045007] 发布于 2023 年 12 月 28 日星期四
authors: Derek B. Schaeffer, Archie F. A. Bott, Marco Borghesi, Kirk A. Flippo, William Fox, Julien Fuchs, Chikang Li, Fredrick H. Séguin, Hye-Sook Park, Petros Tzeferacos, and Louise Willingale
articles.journal: Recent Articles in Rev. Mod. Phys.

articles.title: Quantum repeaters: From quantum networks to the quantum internet
articles.title_zh: 量子中继器：从量子网络到量子互联网
articles.abstract: Author(s): Koji Azuma, Sophia E. Economou, David Elkouss, Paul Hilaire, Liang Jiang, Hoi-Kwong Lo, and Ilan Tzitrin Quantum technology is now at a point where practical work can begin on creating the quantum internet. However, numerous challenges must be overcome before this vision becomes a reality. A global-scale quantum internet requires the development of the quantum repeater, a device that stores and manipulates qubits while interacting with or emitting entangled photons. This review examines different approaches to quantum repeaters and networks, covering their conceptual frameworks, architectures, and current progress in experimental implementation. [Rev. Mod. Phys. 95, 045006] Published Wed Dec 20, 2023
articles.abstract_zh: 作者：Koji Azuma、Sophia E. Economou、David Elkouss、Paul Hilaire、Liang Jiang、Hoi-Kwong Lo 和 Ilan Tzitrin 量子技术现在正处于可以开始创建量子互联网的实际工作的阶段。然而，在这一愿景成为现实之前，必须克服许多挑战。全球规模的量子互联网需要开发量子中继器，这是一种在与纠缠光子交互或发射纠缠光子的同时存储和操纵量子位的设备。这篇综述研究了量子中继器和网络的不同方法，涵盖了它们的概念框架、架构和实验实施的当前进展。 [牧师。模组。物理。 95, 045006] 2023 年 12 月 20 日星期三发布
authors: Koji Azuma, Sophia E. Economou, David Elkouss, Paul Hilaire, Liang Jiang, Hoi-Kwong Lo, and Ilan Tzitrin
articles.journal: Recent Articles in Rev. Mod. Phys.

articles.title: Kinematic variables and feature engineering for particle phenomenology
articles.title_zh: 粒子现象学的运动学变量和特征工程
articles.abstract: Author(s): Roberto Franceschini, Doojin Kim, Kyoungchul Kong, Konstantin T. Matchev, Myeonghun Park, and Prasanth Shyamsundar Kinematic variables are important tools for analyzing collider experiments. This article reviews a variety of such tools, which were designed primarily for the experiments at the Large Hadron Collider, but which have potential uses in other experiments. The article also discusses the interconnection and mutual complementarity of kinematic variables and modern machine-learning techniques. [Rev. Mod. Phys. 95, 045004] Published Tue Nov 21, 2023
articles.abstract_zh: 作者：Roberto Franceschini、Doojin Kim、Kyoungchul Kong、Konstantin T. Matchev、Myinghun Park 和 Prasanth Shyamsundar 运动变量是分析对撞机实验的重要工具。本文回顾了各种此类工具，这些工具主要是为大型强子对撞机的实验而设计的，但在其他实验中也有潜在用途。本文还讨论了运动学变量和现代机器学习技术的相互关联和互补。 [牧师。模组。物理。 95, 045004] 2023 年 11 月 21 日星期二发布
authors: Roberto Franceschini, Doojin Kim, Kyoungchul Kong, Konstantin T. Matchev, Myeonghun Park, and Prasanth Shyamsundar
articles.journal: Recent Articles in Rev. Mod. Phys.

articles.title: Atom counting with accelerator mass spectrometry
articles.title_zh: 使用加速器质谱法进行原子计数
articles.abstract: Author(s): Walter Kutschera, A. J. Timothy Jull, Michael Paul, and Anton Wallner Accelerator mass spectrometry (AMS) is a mass-spectrometric method using entire accelerator systems to measure ultralow traces of long-lived radioisotopes. AMS spectrometers produce an ion beam from a sample of interest and separate ions according to their magnetic, electric, and atomic characteristics. It is thus possible to identify both the mass number and the atomic number of a very rare radioisotope, and count it atom by atom. The review describes the 45-year history since the discovery of AMS, detailed technical aspects, and a wide range of research fields. [Rev. Mod. Phys. 95, 035006] Published Thu Sep 28, 2023
articles.abstract_zh: 作者：Walter Kutschera、A. J. Timothy Jull、Michael Paul 和 Anton Wallner 加速器质谱 (AMS) 是一种使用整个加速器系统来测量超低痕量长寿命放射性同位素的质谱方法。 AMS 光谱仪从感兴趣的样品中产生离子束，并根据离子的磁、电和原子特性分离离子。因此，可以识别非常稀有的放射性同位素的质量数和原子序数，并逐个原子地对其进行计数。该综述描述了 AMS 自发现以来 45 年的历史、详细的技术方面以及广泛的研究领域。 [牧师。模组。物理。 95, 035006] 于 2023 年 9 月 28 日星期四发布
authors: Walter Kutschera, A. J. Timothy Jull, Michael Paul, and Anton Wallner
articles.journal: Recent Articles in Rev. Mod. Phys.

articles.title: Quantitative theory of magnetic interactions in solids
articles.title_zh: 固体中磁相互作用的定量理论
articles.abstract: Author(s): Attila Szilva, Yaroslav Kvashnin, Evgeny A. Stepanov, Lars Nordström, Olle Eriksson, Alexander I. Lichtenstein, and Mikhail I. Katsnelson Magnetic moments in solids become useful and interesting due to the interatomic exchange that causes them to align. Developments in calculations of the electronic structure of solids have led to the ability to predictively compute these interactions in many materials. This review describes the development of these calculations and their application in describing the behavior of materials including technologically important hard and soft magnetic materials, novel two-dimensional magnets, elemental solids, alloys, antiferromagnets, noncollinear magnets, and magnetic molecules containing hundreds of atoms. [Rev. Mod. Phys. 95, 035004] Published Mon Sep 11, 2023
articles.abstract_zh: 作者：Attila Szilva、Yaroslav Kvashnin、Evgeny A. Stepanov、Lars Nordström、Olle Eriksson、Alexander I. Lichtenstein 和 Mikhail I. Katsnelson 由于原子间交换导致固体排列，固体中的磁矩变得有用且有趣。固体电子结构计算的发展使得能够预测计算许多材料中的这些相互作用。本综述介绍了这些计算的发展及其在描述材料行为方面的应用，包括技术上重要的硬磁和软磁材料、新型二维磁体、元素固体、合金、反铁磁体、非共线磁体和包含数百个原子的磁性分子。 [牧师。模组。物理。 95, 035004] 于 2023 年 9 月 11 日星期一发布
authors: Attila Szilva, Yaroslav Kvashnin, Evgeny A. Stepanov, Lars Nordström, Olle Eriksson, Alexander I. Lichtenstein, and Mikhail I. Katsnelson
articles.journal: Recent Articles in Rev. Mod. Phys.

articles.title: Topological phases in polar oxide nanostructures
articles.title_zh: 极性氧化物纳米结构的拓扑相
articles.abstract: Author(s): Javier Junquera, Yousra Nahas, Sergei Prokhorenko, Laurent Bellaiche, Jorge Íñiguez, Darrell G. Schlom, Long-Qing Chen, Sayeef Salahuddin, David A. Muller, Lane W. Martin, and R. Ramesh Topology provides a framework for an understanding of emergent phenomena in various fields such as the appearance of new results in the field of ferroelectrics. A historical introduction and a primer on the concepts of topology are followed by a discussion of experimental and theoretical methods that elucidate the exotic textures that appear in polar oxide nanostructures and superlattices. The complex interplay of several fundamental processes occurring on different energy scales leads to ground states that compete with one another and have large and/or novel responses with respect to external stimuli. [Rev. Mod. Phys. 95, 025001] Published Thu Apr 20, 2023
articles.abstract_zh: 作者：Javier Junquera、Yousra Nahas、Sergei Prokhorenko、Laurent Bellaiche、Jorge Íñiguez、Darrell G. Schlom、Long-Qing Chen、Sayeef Salahuddin、David A. Muller、Lane W. Martin 和 R. Ramesh 拓扑学为理解各个领域的新兴现象（例如铁电体领域新结果的出现）提供了一个框架。在历史介绍和拓扑概念入门之后，讨论了阐明极性氧化物纳米结构和超晶格中出现的奇异纹理的实验和理论方法。在不同能量尺度上发生的几个基本过程的复杂相互作用导致基态相互竞争，并对外部刺激产生大的和/或新颖的响应。 [牧师。模组。物理。 95, 025001] 发布于 2023 年 4 月 20 日星期四
authors: Javier Junquera, Yousra Nahas, Sergei Prokhorenko, Laurent Bellaiche, Jorge Íñiguez, Darrell G. Schlom, Long-Qing Chen, Sayeef Salahuddin, David A. Muller, Lane W. Martin, and R. Ramesh
articles.journal: Recent Articles in Rev. Mod. Phys.

articles.title: Measuring interfacial Dzyaloshinskii-Moriya interaction in ultrathin magnetic films
articles.title_zh: 测量超薄磁性薄膜中的界面 Dzyaloshinskii-Moriya 相互作用
articles.abstract: Author(s): M. Kuepferling, A. Casiraghi, G. Soares, G. Durin, F. Garcia-Sanchez, L. Chen, C. H. Back, C. H. Marrows, S. Tacchi, and G. Carlotti In magnetically ordered systems the Heisenberg exchange interaction between neighboring spins favors collinear alignment such as that seen in ferromagnets and antiferromagnets. The inclusion of antisymmetric exchange, also known as the Dzyaloshinskii–Moriya interaction (DMI), promotes an orthogonal arrangement between spins and is the subject of this review. The DMI interaction is responsible for chiral magnetism, spin-textured skyrmions, and magnetoelectric effects in multiferroic materials. The review, organized by measurement method, is focused on experiments that determine the DMI associated with thin film interfaces occurring in a variety of samples. [Rev. Mod. Phys. 95, 015003] Published Wed Mar 22, 2023
articles.abstract_zh: 作者：M. Kuepferling、A. Casiraghi、G. Soares、G. Durin、F. Garcia-Sanchez、L. Chen、C. H. Back、C. H. Marrows、S. Tacchi 和 G. Carlotti 在磁有序系统中，相邻自旋之间的海森堡交换相互作用有利于共线排列，如铁磁体和反铁磁体中所见。反对称交换，也称为 Dzyaloshinskii-Moriya 相互作用 (DMI)，促进了自旋之间的正交排列，也是本次综述的主题。 DMI 相互作用导致多铁材料中的手性磁性、自旋纹理斯格明子和磁电效应。该综述按测量方法组织，重点关注确定与各种样品中出现的薄膜界面相关的 DMI 的实验。 [牧师。模组。物理。 95, 015003] 2023 年 3 月 22 日星期三发布
authors: M. Kuepferling, A. Casiraghi, G. Soares, G. Durin, F. Garcia-Sanchez, L. Chen, C. H. Back, C. H. Marrows, S. Tacchi, and G. Carlotti
articles.journal: Recent Articles in Rev. Mod. Phys.

articles.title: Synchrotron radiation techniques and their application to actinide materials
articles.title_zh: 同步辐射技术及其在锕系材料中的应用
articles.abstract: Author(s): R. Caciuffo, G. H. Lander, and G. van der Laan The actinides comprise a 15-member group of metallic radioactive elements occupying the bottom row of the periodic table. Electron localization accompanied by the formation of large magnetic moments due to the strong Coulomb repulsion is balanced by hybridization with neighboring-atom electronic states. This hybridization promotes an opposite tendency toward itinerancy and the emergence of complex behavior. This review shows how x-ray synchrotron radiation techniques provide a variety of powerful tools to unravel the complexity of actinide materials. Experimental techniques, theoretical background, and applications to actinide materials are covered in detail. [Rev. Mod. Phys. 95, 015001] Published Fri Mar 03, 2023
articles.abstract_zh: 作者：R. Caciuffo、G. H. Lander 和 G. van der Laan 锕系元素由 15 个金属放射性元素组成，占据元素周期表的底行。电子局域化伴随着由于强库仑斥力而形成的大磁矩，通过与邻近原子电子态的杂化来平衡。这种混合促进了相反的流动趋势和复杂行为的出现。这篇综述展示了 X 射线同步加速器辐射技术如何提供各种强大的工具来揭示锕系材料的复杂性。详细介绍了实验技术、理论背景以及锕系材料的应用。 [牧师。模组。物理。 95, 015001] 发表于 2023 年 3 月 3 日星期五
authors: R. Caciuffo, G. H. Lander, and G. van der Laan
articles.journal: Recent Articles in Rev. Mod. Phys.

articles.title: Colloquium : Advances in automation of quantum dot devices control
articles.title_zh: 研讨会：量子点设备控制自动化的进展
articles.abstract: Author(s): Justyna P. Zwolak and Jacob M. Taylor A promising platform for quantum computing consists of arrays of quantum dots. However, operating these devices presents a challenging control problem, since the location of the dots and the charges they contain must be reliably and reproducibly matched with the gate voltages. This Colloquium explains how automated control protocols that make use of machine learning techniques can succeed in systems where heuristic control is not feasible. [Rev. Mod. Phys. 95, 011006] Published Fri Feb 17, 2023
articles.abstract_zh: 作者：Justyna P. Zwolak 和 Jacob M. Taylor 一个有前途的量子计算平台由量子点阵列组成。然而，操作这些器件提出了一个具有挑战性的控制问题，因为点的位置及其包含的电荷必须可靠且可重复地与栅极电压匹配。本次研讨会解释了利用机器学习技术的自动化控制协议如何在启发式控制不可行的系统中取得成功。 [牧师。模组。物理。 95, 011006] 发布于 2023 年 2 月 17 日星期五
authors: Justyna P. Zwolak and Jacob M. Taylor
articles.journal: Recent Articles in Rev. Mod. Phys.
